faqs.question: Is studying at the ITS Engineering College expensive?
faqs.answer:
ITS Engineering College offers courses such as BTech and MBA in full-time mode for the duration varying from 2 years to 4 years. The College offers BTech on the basis of Class 12 qualification with a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50%.
While, for MBA, ITS Engineering College offers admission on the basis of graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50%. In addition to this, candidates must secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, UPTAC, CUET-PG or equivalent. ITS Engineering College fee structure offers these courses with a tuition fees varying from INR 1.3 Lacs to INR 4.2 Lakh. Considering the fee structure of ITS Engineering College, it is moderately expensive.

college_info.intro:
ITS Engineering College offers courses such as BTech and MBA as popular courses. The College offers them in full-time mode for a duration varying from 2 years to 4 years. Furthermore, the College offers admission to these courses on the basis of merit and an entrance exam. Therefore, candidates must secure a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50% in in Class 12 for admission to BTech and 50% in graduation for admission to MBA.
Candidates must also secure valid scores in accepted entrance exams such as JEE Main, UPTAC, CUET-PG and other equivalent exams to secure admission at the ITS Engineering College. Furthermore, the College offers these courses with a fee structure including a tuition fee ranging from INR 1.3 Lakh to INR 4.2 Lakh. The ITS Engineering College also provides placements through the panel of top recruiters, along with placement assistance.
For more information about the ITS Engineering College, check out the video below:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: ITS Engineering College offers a UG programme in various specialisations of Engineering & Technology, each for a 4-year duration. The College also offers a PG programme in Management, which is of a 2-year duration. Besides this, it also extends a BTech- Lateral Entry programme of three-year duration. The College offers these courses with a fee structure including the tuition fee, which ranges from INR 1.3 Lakh to INR 4.2 Lakh.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get into ITS Engineering College without JEE Mains. The college offers admission to its BTech programs based on the following criteria:Class 12 marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM)Entrance exam conducted by ITS Engineering College (ITSEE)
faqs.question: Can I get into ITS Engineering College without JEE Mains?

faqs.answer: A:    ITS Engineering College BTech in Mechanical Engineering is offered for the duration of 4 years in full-time mode. The College offers this course in UG level with an annual intake of 30 students. ITS Engineering College offers BTech in Mechanical Engineering with a fee structure including the tuition fees worth INR 3.44 Lakh.
faqs.question: What is the fees of ITS Engineering College BTech in Mechanical Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    The total intake of ITS Engineering College for MBA is of 60 students. These seats are allocated to eligible applicants based on their performance in the accepted entrance exam, i.e. CUET PG, followed by the UPTAC counselling. The college also allocates some seats under the Management Quota. Participating in the UPTAC counselling is not required for these seats. The mentioned information is sourced from the official website of the college/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.
faqs.question: How many seats are there in ITS Engineering College for MBA?

The college accepts MBA admissions in two ways. The eligibility criteria for the two is slightly different from one another. The following table presents the eligibility criteria for both the ways:ITS Greater Noida MBA AdmissionEligibility CriteriaThrough UPTAC counselingA recognised Bachelor's Degree of at least three years, with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% in the case of SC/ST candidates)Mangament Qouta/Vacant SeatsA Bachelor's Degree with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% in the case of SC/ST candidates)(Preference is given to candidates who have valid CAT/MAT/XAT/ATMA/CMAT scores)

reviews_list.review_title: Overall experience is good.

reviews_list.review_title: Good placement, not a big campus, but a happy campus and the teacher is good at behaviour.

Not all Wi-Fi supports, some Wi-Fi are supported in specific places, for example, admission cell, fee counter, dean's office, lab, etc. Food is average, not all is well, but decent taste, medical facilities are not proper, sports are not too good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence And Machine Learning - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely average college for everything, not too much good, not too much bad.

review_content.Placements: 50% placed from campus, and 30% are placed off campus. The lowest package is 1.2 LPA, and the highest package is 44 LPA. Top companies are Accenture, Infosys, TCS, etc. Too many students got internships from the CSE core background at Infosys, TCS, etc. The top roles offered in my college are B.Tech, BCA, BBA, MBA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Some teachers are good, very friendly, and some are too strict, more than parents. Infrastructure is good in all, like in college, you will get clean water, clean washrooms, etc., and have a canteen or a juice corner. Wi-Fi is available, but it never works as fast as my mobile network. The hostel is also good, but the mess food is not that good or healthy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, but from 2nd year, there is not this much strictness.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average as it is a third-tier college. For better placement, you need to work hard and smart. Everyone says GL Bajaj is good for placements, but it also does not offer 100% placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very good, but as you know, no one is perfect, and similarly, this college is also not perfect. Mess food is not good at all. Everyone eats it because they have to. There is good engagement in sports and games. Medical support is available. There is a branch of a medical college behind our college.
review_content.Faculty: Most teachers are good and friendly, even frank, but our Maths teacher is very strict. Some other teachers are also strict. Semester exams are not very hard, but you need to study. Otherwise, failing is certain. In sessional tests, most students fail, scoring very low marks like 2, 3, or 4 out of 50. I scored 15/50 in Maths and passed with God’s help. There are also experienced teachers, but our Physics teacher is always confused. I think she does not know how to teach.

faqs.question: Q: Is studying at the ITS Engineering College expensive?

faqs.answer: ITS Engineering College is worth the hype, considering the accreditation, certifications and approvals it has offered. The College offers courses in affiliation with AKTU and various approvals. Being a private college, ITS Engineering College, was ranked within the rank band 151-300 under the Innovation category by NIRF 2023. It is recognised by IIC, CSIR and DSIR, approved by AICTE and accredited by NAAC and NBA. The hype around the college is due to the placement facilities and scholarship opportunities it has offered.
faqs.question: Q: Is ITS Engineering College worth all the hype?

faqs.answer: The college has released the branch-wise list of recruiters for BTech placements. Goldman Sachs, Cognizant, and TCS were leading companies that participated in Civil Engineering placement sessions over the past few years. While, Zensar, Capgemini, Intellipaat, Virtusa, etc. were part of the CSE placement drive. EEE, ECE, and Mechanical Engineering branches witnessed the participation of Mphasis, Wipro, Amazon, Cvent, Newgen, JK Technosoft Limited, and many other prominent recruiters. In addition, out of 142 offers made during 2023 placements, the majority were grabbed by CSE students. The branch-wise offers made during ITS Engineering College placements 2023 are tabulated below:BranchNo. of Placement Offers (2023)CSE97ME17ECE14EEE10CE4
faqs.question: Q: Is ITS Engineering College good for BTech?

faqs.answer: No, CUET syllabus is not based on CBSE syllabus as claimed by Education Ministry in Rajya Sabha. The CUET exam is designed to assess the general understandig of the candidate in subjects he/she has opted for. CUET UG is on of the biggest UG entrance exam carnival conducted for admission in cebtral, state, private and deemed universities.Candidates preparing for CUET UG exam must check the detailed CUET syllabus and CUET question paper to become familiar with the important topics and type of questions asked in the exam.

admission_overview.college_name: ITS Engineering College Admission 2026: Application, Eligibility, Courses & Fee

admission_process.title: ITS Engineering College Admission 2026

paragraphs: ITS Engineering College admission is ongoing. Students can pursue two programmes i.e.,MBAandBTech,in the fields of Management and Technology, respectively at the institute. Additionally, the institute also offers lateral entry for the BTech programme. The admission process of the institute is conducted online.ITS Engineering Collegeprovides the course in affiliation with Dr. A.P.J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU). Students seeking admission must meet the admission criteria prior to applying. Interested candidates can read the following article to learn about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, fee, and admission process of the institute.

ITS Engineering College course admissionisentrance-based. The eligibility for various courses at the institute is the last qualifying examination, i.e., Class 12 for the UG programme and a bachelor's degree for the PG programme. The selection of candidates is done based on merit or entrance exam scores. Students are offered Major and Minor degree in BTech across multiple specialisations. Students can refer to the table below to know about the eligibility and selection criteria for theITS Engineering College courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria
Class 12 with 45% aggregate in PCM from a recognised board
JEE Main+UPTAC
Bachelor’s degree with 50% aggregate from a recognised board
CUET-PG+UPSEE

ITS Engineering College admission procedureis inclusive of several steps, including application, shortlisting, counselling, and admission confirmation. Students looking to apply for the programmes offered at the institute are required to appear for the course-specific entrance exam and fulfil the eligibility criteria before applying. The admission process for the institute can be done both online and offline. Interested students can follow the step-wiseITS Engineering College admission process:
Step 1: ITS Engineering College Application Process

The application process for ITS Engineering College varies as per the course selected by the students. Students wishing to apply for the BTech course need to apply and appear for the JEE Main exam. For the MBA course, students are required to appear for the CUET PG exam. For direct admissions, once the results are out, students can apply on the official website of the institute.
For admissions through JEE Mains or UPSEE, selected students need to visit the registrar's office with the allotment letter issued by the respective counselling in favour of ITS Engineering College.
Step 2:ITS Engineering College Selection Process

ITS Engineering College shortlists the candidates for its course based on several factors. The institute considers scores obtained by the candidates in JEE Main (for BTech) and CUET PG (for MBA). For students applying through direct admissions, the institute may conduct a round of written tests or personal interviews to shortlist the candidate.
Step 3: ITS Engineering College Counselling
Once the entrance exam results are out, students applying on an entrance basis are required to participate in the UPTAC/ UPSEE counselling for seat allotment.
Step 4:ITS Engineering College Admission Confirmation

Post the seat allotment, students must pay the fee as per the fee structure of the institute. The fee can be paid either through online mode or through a Demand Draft drawn in favour of “ITS Engineering College, payable at Greater Noida". Further procedures will be conducted in the college.

courses_data.description: BE/BTech is a four-year course offered at the undergraduate level. The course is provided across multiple specialisations such as Computer Science and Engineering, AI and Machine Learning, CSE, Data Science, Civil Engineering and more. Students seeking ITS Engineering College BTech admission must check the eligibility criteria set by the institution and have a valid score in the JEE Main exam. The institute also offers lateral entry for some of the BTech courses. Some of the important highlights related to admission are given below:

faqs.question: How can candidates join ITS Engineering College?
faqs.answer: ITS Engineering College course admission is entrance-based. The eligibility for various courses at the College is the last qualifying examination, i.e., Class 12 for the UG programme and a bachelor's degree for the PG programme. The application process for ITS Engineering College varies as per the course selected by the candidates.The College shortlists the candidates for its course based on several factors. It considers scores obtained by the candidates in JEE Main (for BTech) and CUET PG (for

faqs.question: How can I apply online for ITS Engineering College MBA admission?
faqs.answer: ITS Engineering College MBA application process can be completed online on the official website of the college. The steps included in the online application process are as follows:Step 1: Visit the official website of ITS Engineering College and click on the 'Apply Now' button shown on the side of the screen.Step 2: Register yourself by providing the required details, such as name, state, city, preferred course, etc.Step 3: Login using the registered credentials and complete the application form

faqs.question: What BTech courses does ITS Engineering College?
faqs.answer: ITS Engineering College provides a full-time programme in BTech across multiple specialisations. The institute offers the programme in the following specialisations:Computer Science and EngineeringArtificial Intelligence and Machine LearningCSE (Data Science)Civil EngineeringMechanical EngineeringElectronics and Communication Engineering

courses_data.name: ITS Engineering College MBA Admission 2026
courses_data.description: ITS Engineering College offers a regular Master of Business Administration (MBA) programme with dual specialisation. The College offers six specialisations under this programme approved by AICTE. The institute offers admission to the MBA programme through UPSEE Counselling or Direct Admission under the Management Quota and Vacant Seats. The table below presents the admission-related details of the MBA programme offered at ITS Engineering College: Download ITS MBA Brochure

faqs.question: Is MBA available at ITS Engineering College?
faqs.answer: Yes,MBAis available at ITS Engineering College. Students are offered the course in the full-time mode. Admission to the programme are primarily entrance-based, hence students are required to appear for the accepted exams. Additionally, students must satisfy the minimum eligibility i.e., graduation with a minimum of 50% from a recognised university. Students can also get direct admission in the institute by applying via the management quota.

faqs.question: Can I get into ITS Engineering College for MBA without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: AlthoughITS Engineering MBA admissionis primarily entrance-based, you can still get in to the programme without appearing for the entrance exam. The institute has a few seats reserved for students applying through direct admission/ management quota. However, students might need to appear for an institute-level exam or personal interview if ITS Engineering College specifies. Students can visit the institute's official website and apply for the programme by filling out the available application fo

faqs.question: Can I get into ITS Engineering College without JEE Mains?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get into ITS Engineering College without JEE Mains. The college offers admission to its BTech programs based on the following criteria:Class 12 marks in Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM)Entrance exam conducted by ITS Engineering College (ITSEE)

faqs.question: What courses does ITS Engineering College offer?
faqs.answer: ITS Engineering College, Greater Noidaoffers two programme;BTechat the undergraduate level andMBAat the postgraduate level. Admission to the courses is bothmerit and entrance-based. The admission cycle is currently ongoing. Interested students can visit the official website of the college and apply for the desired course by filling out the application form available.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam scores are accepted by ITS Engineering College?
faqs.answer: ITS Engineering College, Greater Noida, accepts JEE Main, UPCET (formerly UPSEE), and direct admission based on PCM qualification for BTech admission.

faqs.question: Is studying at the ITS Engineering College expensive?
faqs.answer: ITS Engineering College offers courses such as BTech and MBA in full-time mode for the duration varying from 2 years to 4 years. The College offers BTech on the basis of Class 12 qualification with a minimum aggregate of 45% to 50%. While, for MBA, ITS Engineering College offers admission on the basis of graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50%. Considering the fee structure of ITS Engineering College, it is moderately expensive.

hostel_campus.college_name: ITS Engineering College Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Separate hostels with twin/three sharing basis are provided for boys and girls. This includes separate mess with latest kitchen, spacious dining halls. Each floor has facilities for toilets, bathroom, common room, recreation activities which comprise of TV, indoor games and newspapers.24*7 security and wifi connectivity is available in the hostel. Other than these facilities such as room coolers, RO water supply, hot water, laundry facility, and ac rooms are available.
Student can also access to the library and computer lab after the normal working hours.

library.description: Institute has a spacious modern library houses a rich stock of text & reference books, magazines, periodicals, journals, CD's and videos. The library is fully computerized with the help of "Alice for Windows", the library automation software. The number of books is 56623, number of national journals is 42, the number of international journals is 24, the number of magazines is 15, subscribed newspapers are 14 and 307 ebooks. Photocopying and book bank facility is also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is average.
reviews.review_text: In my college, there is AC in all classrooms, whiteboards are available, library is big, teachers are supportive and helpful, staffs are too good. I don’t live in hostel. I am a day scholar, but I heard from students who live in hostels, they said that hostel is totally bad, food is not good, and cleaning is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Students who get good percentage in 12th or JEE Main get scholarships in fees.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. Wi-Fi is available but password is not given to students. There are good labs in college. Classroom is excellent. Library is very good and big. Sorry, I do not live in a college hostel. But I can say that the food is average and the warden is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Overall experience is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure at my college are amazing. According to me, the college labs and classrooms are already modified and classified in a modern way with amazing interiors and smart classes. The quality of facilities in our hostel is amazing, and the quality of food is also good, not so good. The quality of like media and the quality of canteen food are also good, and the medical facilities are also good. Sports and games feel amazing in these fields our college makes the most c...

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, not a big campus, but a happy campus and the teacher is good at behaviour.
reviews.review_text: In my college, network issues are rare. Not all Wi-Fi supports, some Wi-Fi are supported in specific places, for example, admission cell, fee counter, dean's office, lab, etc. Food is average, not all is well, but decent taste, medical facilities are not proper, sports are not too good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely average college for everything, not too much good, not too much bad.
reviews.review_text: Some teachers are good, very friendly, and some are too strict, more than parents. Infrastructure is good in all, like in college, you will get clean water, clean washrooms, etc., and have a canteen or a juice corner. Wi-Fi is available, but it never works as fast as my mobile network. The hostel is also good, but the mess food is not that good or healthy.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty, but from 2nd year, there is not this much strictness.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good, but as you know, no one is perfect, and similarly, this college is also not perfect. Mess food is not good at all. Everyone eats it because they have to. There is good engagement in sports and games. Medical support is available. There is a branch of a medical college behind our college.

reviews.review_heading: The highest strengths are excellent infrastructure and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned. They are equipped with smart boards and projectors. Each department having labs. The electronics department labs have modern equipment for hands-on training. The hostels are clean and well maintained, with options for both boys and girls. Facilities include a mess, laundry, gym, and indoor and outdoor sports areas.

reviews.review_heading: If you do not appear in JEE-Main/ low rank in JEE Main, then you can get admission.
reviews.review_text: The hostel of ITS Engineering College is good, and it provides Wi-Fi also, and the library of our college is also very good, and the campus is a little bit small, but overall, it's good. The mess and canteen are also good, and the medical facilities are provided by the college, like first aid and no-cost treatment of teeth in the ITS dental.

reviews.review_heading: Good college in terms of return on investment.
reviews.review_text: The campus hostel is not that good. But if you talk about classroom and labs, they are well-equipped with modern facilities. Although the campus is not big enough but it's enough to enjoy a decent college life. I would suggest that you not expect so much from this college on the basis of infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and facilities, but the sports are not good.
reviews.review_text: Library and classroom are better, and the infrastructure is good. The canteen is normal. Faculty are treated well and help in our project to develop new technology, but the food is of low quality. This food has no taste. Sports are not played very well in our college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. Teachers are a little mad, but the members are so nice.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good here, but we see that the buildings are too small. Overall, the infrastructure is good for educational purposes, but a year ago, there was too much free space. As time passes, the place has become much smaller.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied because of the placement percentage of 2025 CSE branch students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is quite decent, which makes the college fantastic. The hostel facilities are very good, with secure rooms and CCTV everywhere. Everyone got their personal locker to store their luggage. Food facilities are fantastic 4 times a day.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a decent college.
reviews.review_text: ITS Engineering College offers a well-rounded environment for both academics and comfortable living. For academics the college provides state-of-the-art laboratories, well-equipped seminar and lecture halls, and a well-stocked central library with extensive resources. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled, ensuring seamless connectivity for all.

reviews.review_heading: I'm very satisfied with this college and its facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of this college are very good compared to other colleges in this area. Labs and the library in college are the best. Free Wi-Fi with high-speed is available. All classrooms and labs have AC. All study material is available in the library. All medical facilities are also available on the college's second campus. The hostel has spacious rooms, and the food is not as good as home but is manageable. The college has all facilities for sports and is very active in sports ...

reviews.review_heading: It has average placement and really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure in our college are fabulous. All the facilities in the hostel are good. The facilities and infrastructure available for our course/department, such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, are excellent. The quality of the facilities in the hostel, including food in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games, is also good.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about ITS Engineering College

likes.text: Many companies come to our college every year for placements, like TCS, Wipro, HCL, BYJU's, ICICI Bank, Hike, Hackerrank and many more.
The college always tries to give their best to place students in top companies by giving extra classes, technical classes, and boot camps.

likes.text: The quality of the food served is also good, but the canteen doesn't offer many food varieties.
The infrastructure of the college is quite great from classroom to labs to the canteen.

likes.text: Faculty are well qualified, teach good stuff and also help the students in every aspect other than studies.
Here everything is done in class before exams, and also a lot of things are taught practically in different courses.

likes.text: I wish the college provide a more practical oriented programme, which makes a huge impact on our career growth and technical knowledge.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Gopalan College of Engineering and Management admission process 2025 is entrance-based. At the UG level, Gopalan College of Engineering and Management offers four-year, full-time BTech courses to students in six specialisations. At the PG level, the college offers a two-year MBA programme. Some of the BTech specialisations offered at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management are listed below:

faqs.answer: A:    Studying at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management (Gopalan COEM) is not very expensive, . The following are some salient details regarding the cost and accessibility of studying there:The annual tuition fees for core engineering branches, such as computer science, mechanical, and civil engineering, range from 85,000 to 1 lakh. A few of the more recent branches may cost a little bit more.The cost structure of this college is fairly similar to that of other reputable private engineering colleges in Karnataka. unquestionably far less than accredited or private universities.Gopalan COEM provides programs to reduce tuition for students from lower-income families in addition to scholarships awarded based on merit or rank.Additional institutional costs are typically nonexistent. If necessary, hostel and mess fees range from 75,000 to 90,000 per year. Since educational loans can cover 90–100% of the total cost of a program, even students from lower-class or middle-class backgrounds can afford it.In summary, Gopalan COEM's fee structure is average when compared to the median annual engineering college fees in the private sector. For students in need, there are payment plans and educational loans available as well. Thus, it is not really possible to argue that studying there is too costly.
faqs.question: Is studying at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management expensive?

faqs.answer: A:    The application fee for Gopalan College of Engineering and Management is INR 500. Aspirants applying online can submit the fee via any of the online payment modes. For offline submission, candidates need to send a demand draft, of INR 500 drawn in favour of “Gopalan College of Engineering and Management” payable at Bangalore.
faqs.question: What is the application fee at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management?

faqs.answer: A:    No, Gopalan College of Engineering and Management offers admission based on entrance exam scores. The college considers COMEDK UGET or KCET scores for admission to BTech course. However, mere qualifying the entrance exam won't guarantee admission in the college. Aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility and other selection requirements for admission.
faqs.question: Can students join Gopalan College of Engineering and Management directly without any entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    The total cost of stuyding BE in Gopalan College of Engineering and Management ranges from INR 1.49 Lacs to INR 7.44 Lakh. The BE course at GCEM is for four years with various specialiations. According to the placement reports, the median salary package offered at GCEM is INR 3.5 lakh.

review_summary.college_name: Gopalan College of Engineering and Management Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Complete review of Gopalan college.

content.Placements: The college hostel and placements are very good. Placements are the best at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management. Bangalore is the IT hub of India, and Whitefield is the main sector. Gopalan has its center at this place, so every company is nearby, like TCS, Microsoft, Capgemini; everybody comes to our college. The placement manager guides us on how to crack our placement aptitude tests, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and hostel are very good in Gopalan College. We have a vast campus, a canteen, and a hostel with very clean, hygienic rooms. The warden is very close to everybody and treats everyone like her children. In the library, we have every book from every department, and we also have other books which are not needed for our department, like value education books, which help us to read faster and give us motivation.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college doesn't meet the primary requirements but has great knowledge of the course.

content.Placements: There are not many students who got placement here on this campus. There is career guidance and opportunities to get into the proper places through the guidance. There are not many top companies in our course. There are at least 50% of students who get internships. There are not many roles offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, with a Wi-Fi connection and a good classroom and library. It has a canteen, a football field, a cricket ground, and a tennis court. It has a separate sports building where there is badminton and so on. The medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.title: There were good placements this year and there were many events held.

content.Placements: 100 percent of students pass out of our mechanical department. The highest package is INR 5 lakh. The percentage of students who got internships from our course is 50 percent, and the top roles offered are project head manager in Hal, and you can go for designing roles too.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is available.  Hostel quality is good.  The quality of food is good, the medical quality is good, and there are good sports facilities, including indoor badminton courts, football turf, and a cricket ground, as well as indoor cricket nets and a swimming pool.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Really good for placements, great faculty, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 80 percent of students are placed with a good package, and top companies are recruiting with a good package. The mechanical students are having a great opportunity for placements, and the top companies are recruiting for the mechanical students, and they provide free internships for mechanical students.

All branch laboratories have great infrastructure, and the mechanical and civil labs are very good, with great machines, and all are in good condition.

admission_overview.college_name: Gopalan College of Engineering and Management Admission 2025: Eligibility, Application, Dates, Fees

admission_process.title: GCEM Bangalore Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: GCEM Bangalore admissionsare entrance-based. The college considers scores in COMEDK or KCET exams.GCEM BangaloreBTech courses are offered in several specialisations. The admission procedure is the same for every course. The GCEM Bangalore application process can be completed in both online and offline modes.

Gopalan College of Engineering and Management course admissions are entrance based, requiring candidates to appear for either the COMEDK, UGET and KCET entrance exam. In addition to this, candidates are also required to fulfil the eligibility criteria as shown in the table below for theGCEM Bangalore courses:
COMEDK UGET/KCET

GCEM Bangalore fee is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Students pursuing BTech from the college can expect an average package of INR 4 lakh. The table below shows theGCEM Bangalore feeand seat intake:
NOTE:The given fee information is as per the official website/ sanctioning body. It is still subject to changes and hence, is indicative.
GCEM Bangalore admissions are currently open. Candidates must first register with a valid score in the accepted entrance exam for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in the college:
1: GCEM Bangalore Application Process

Candidates can apply for admissions in both online and offline mode. Offline applications require candidates to obtain a copy of the admission form from the admission office of GCEM. Getting a copy requires the candidates to pay the GCEM Bangalore application fee which stans at INR 500.
2: Document Verification

If the name of the candidate is present on the GCEM merit-list, they will be called for the document verification process. Candidates in this stage will be required to appear before the committee with the original copies of their documents as requested.
3: Payment of Admission Fees
Once completed, candidates will need to pay the GCEM Bangalore admission fee. After the fees has been paid, the admission of a candidate is considered confirmed at GCEM, Bangalore.

courses_data.description: Gopalan College of Engineering and Management offers four-year BTech course divided into eight semesters. The college offers BTech in various specialisations such asComputer Science, Aeronautical Engineering,Civil, Mechanical, etc. Candidates who have passed Class 12 are eligible to apply for the BTech programme.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for B.Tech at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: Aspirants who have passed Class 12 or equivalent examination with at least 45% aggregate with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects, along with any one of the following subjects, namely,Chemistry, Bio-Technology,Biology, Electronics and Computer Science are eligible to apply for Gopalan College of Engineering and Management BTech course.There is a 5% relaxation in the aggregate for candidates from Karnataka belonging to SC/ST and other backward classes.

faqs.question: Is Mathematics compulsory to apply for B.Tech at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: Yes, Physics and Mathematics are compulsory subjects to apply for BTech at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management. Candidates must have studies these subjects in Class 12 along with one of the optional subjects such as namely, Chemistry, Bio-Technology, Biology, Electronics and Computer Science. The minimum aggregate required in Class 12 is 45% for the BTech programme.

faqs.question: Is B.Tech worth pursuing from Gopalan College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: BTech is the flagship programme of Gopalan College of Engineering and Management. The college is known to offer good placement packages to BTech students. As per the NIRF report 2024 available on the official website, themedian packageoffered during Gopalan College of Engineering and ManagementBTechplacements2023stood atINR 3.5 LPA.

faqs.question: Is studying at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management expensive?
faqs.answer: Studying at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management (Gopalan COEM) is not very expensive, . The following are some salient details regarding the cost and accessibility of studying there:The annual tuition fees for core engineering branches, such as computer science, mechanical, and civil engineering, range from 85,000 to 1 lakh. A few of the more recent branches may cost a little bit more.The cost structure of this college is fairly similar to that of other reputable private engineering co

faqs.question: Can students join Gopalan College of Engineering and Management directly without any entrance exam?
faqs.answer: No, Gopalan College of Engineering and Management offers admission based on entrance exam scores. The college considers COMEDK UGET or KCET scores for admission to BTech course. However, mere qualifying the entrance exam won't guarantee admission in the college. Aspirants must also fulfil the eligibility and other selection requirements for admission.

faqs.question: What is the KCET cutoff for admission to B.Tech at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: KCET is one of the accepting exams for Gopalan College of Engineering and Management BTech admission. In 2024, the closing rank was 77564 for Computer Science Engineering. This was the highest closing rank among all the BTech specialisations followed by 102083 for Aeronautical Engineering. CSE which is a popular BTech specialisation saw declining trend in the past three years. From 39137 in 2022,  47577 in 2023 and 77564 in 2024.

faqs.question: Can students get selected at Gopalan College of Engineering and Management with UGET range of 60-70 percentile?
faqs.answer: Gopalan College of Engineering and Management considers COMEDK UGET scores for admission to BTech course. As per the information available on web, a 60-70 percentile in COMEDK corresponds to a rank of 23,200 - 14,700. In 2024 COMEDK UGET cutoff, the closing rank was 45,603 for Computer Science Engineering. Hence, aspirants with 60-70 percentile have a good chance of getting a seat in the college.

faqs.question: Does Gopalan College of Engineering and Management accept JEE score?
faqs.answer: As per the official website of Gopalan College of Engineering and Management, the college does not accepts JEE Main score. The college considers scores in KCET or COMEDK-UGET for admission to BTech programme. Candidates scoring equal or above the GCEM cutoff are eligible for admission.

faqs.question: Does GCEM have 100% placement for BE course?
faqs.answer: Gopalan College of Engineering and Management placement drives are organised for the students to secure employment in the reputed companies such as Capgemini, IBM, HCL, etc. The college provides full placement assistance to the students.

faqs.question: Can HCL and Accenture be considered as some of the top recruiters of Gopalan College of Engineering and Management?
faqs.answer: 80 percent of students are placed with a good package, and top companies are recruiting with a good package. The mechanical students are having a great opportunity for placements, and the top companies are recruiting for the mechanical students, and they provide free internships for mechanical students.Gopalan College of Engineering and Management (GCEM) is a reputable educational institution known for producing talented engineers and managers. While HCL and Accenture are both well-known multinational corporations with a significant presence in the technology industry, I cannot provide a definitive answer on whether they can be considered as top recruiters of GCEM, as the institution has a wide range of recruiters who hire from their student pool. However, HCL and Accenture are certainly among the companies that GCEM students often target due to their high market value in the job market.

reviews.review_heading: Complete review of Gopalan college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are very good in Gopalan College. We have a vast campus, a canteen, and a hostel with very clean, hygienic rooms. The warden is very close to everybody and treats everyone like her children. In the library, we have every book from every department, and we also have other books which are not needed for our department, like value education books, which help us to read faster and give us motivation.

reviews.review_heading: This college doesn't meet the primary requirements but has great knowledge of the course.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good, with a Wi-Fi connection and a good classroom and library. It has a canteen, a football field, a cricket ground, and a tennis court. It has a separate sports building where there is badminton and so on. The medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: There were good placements this year and there were many events held.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is available. 
Hostel quality is good. 
The quality of food is good, the medical quality is good, and there are good sports facilities, including indoor badminton courts, football turf, and a cricket ground, as well as indoor cricket nets and a swimming pool.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and good teaching.
reviews.review_text: Library is good and there is proper Wi-Fi connection. Mechanical labs are nice. Hostel is also good with warden and there is good food provided in the hostel mess. Medical facilities are also available in hostel for any emergency. Sports and games are properly conducted in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good for placements, great faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure with neat classrooms and Wi-Fi is available, and the library and the quality of the mess and canteen food are good. All branch laboratories have great infrastructure, and the mechanical and civil labs are very good, with great machines, and all are in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: Review about gopalan college .
reviews.review_text: Good infra and hostel are well maintained. Food provided by the management is good and nutrition. The dining area is clean and neat and they will make all types food like north side food for the north side students. Medical facilities are provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college has really good infrastructure and the faculty are very helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. It has very good hostel facility for both boys and girls. The campus is safe and secure with 24/7 electricity and water supply. The infrastructure is comfortable and conducive to learning. College provides good environment for extracurricular activities such as quiz competitions, art and painting, cooking competitions, dance and singing.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It had a good infrastructure. Overall, labs, classrooms, and the library were good. There were excellent facilities for playing indoor and outdoor games. The food served to hostelers was good. There were two canteens for hostelers and day scholars.

reviews.review_heading: The college environment and the teacher team made me satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The facilities the college is providing are good, we can say time to time checking for the device and components is going after 2 months. Many digital things are also provided by college as digital library, electric attendance taking machine. There is time to time cleaning and maintenance is managed by the authority.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good. All labs are good and working well. Our college has a library which provides knowledge to students. The infrastructure of our college building is excellent. The hostel is near our college. Our college has a canteen. Our campus is huge.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi, good labs, decent classrooms, a gym, and a decent library. Our college provides a field for cricket, football, and badminton. Our college has a separate block for indoor games such as athletics, shuttle, and table tennis.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of the faculty, and placements but the infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: We don't have a Wi-Fi connectivity option. The classrooms were good, and it is a newly constructed building. Even the labs are good and the library as well, but we didn't have a lot of books there. The mess food is horrible. There's no canteen available in the college. Sports facilities are also good. There are 2 football courts.

reviews.review_heading: I will definitely recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are well-ventilated and have Wi-Fi connectivity. Labs are huge, and classrooms are very hygienic. The library has a wide collection of books that are very helpful for our reference. Hostel food is good. Sports and games must be given equal importance.

reviews.review_heading: I don't recommend this college.
reviews.review_text: Food is the worst of all, and I don't recommend this hostel. There is Wi-Fi, but it never gives enough speed even to deliver normal messages. Girls and boys live in the same hostel building, which is the worst. The washrooms are very untidy. The washing machine doesn't work well.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the worst.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very bad, and the food is not at all good here. Wi-Fi is available, but it doesn't work properly. The hostel is the worst, and the rooms are not that clean. Washrooms are also not good. Hostel food is the worst.

review_summary.college_name: Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Campus life is vibrant with cultural and technical fests.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students from AI & this get placed every year. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA, the average package offered is 4 to 6 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, and Capgemini. Internships are offered in firms like TCS iON and AI/ML startups. Roles include Data Analyst, AI Engineer, Software Developer, and ML Engineer. Placement training and mock interviews help improve results.
content.Infrastructure: The campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. AI labs are equipped with the latest software and high end systems. The hostel has spacious rooms with Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. Food in the mess is decent with hygienic preparation. Medical facilities, sports, and a gym are available for students. Overall, infrastructure supports both academics and personal growth.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent start, but it needs improvement.

content.Placements: Placement opportunities are limited especially for core branches. Only a few companies visit the campus and the packages offered are mostly low. Students are good and almost all receive placement training but it's not very impactful in terms of real results.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good, but non-AC rooms and labs are also adequate. Classes are clean, and the service provided at facilities is okay. The college is clean, and overall, it's good. I'd give it 5 stars.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and powerful, and they provide good learning experiences. Some professors are helpful and experienced, while others are less engaging or hard to approach. Teaching methods are mostly theory-based with a limited focus on overall practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: For me, the placements are decent, but faculty or infrastructure is good. The campus is also good.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in our college. Only 20-30% of students get good placements through college. So, I would rate it three stars only. Students got placed with good packages. Many students got internships from college in good companies. The faculty also helps in placement training.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure facilities, like new labs and an auditorium. The hostel infrastructure is not good enough, but they are renovating it. Our college campus is way better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

paragraphs: Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.Sankalchand Patel College of Engineeringoffers courses at UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate levels. Some of the courses include BBA, B.Sc., MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,50,000 - 3,40,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years - 5 years. PG courses are offered for 1 year - 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is vibrant with cultural and technical fests.
reviews.review_text: The campus has modern labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a rich library. AI labs are equipped with the latest software and high end systems. The hostel has spacious rooms with Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. Food in the mess is decent with hygienic preparation. Medical facilities, sports, and a gym are available for students. Overall, infrastructure supports both academics and personal growth.

reviews.review_heading: A decent start, but it needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, but non-AC rooms and labs are also adequate. Classes are clean, and the service provided at facilities is okay. The college is clean, and overall, it's good. I'd give it 5 stars.

reviews.review_heading: For me, the placements are decent, but faculty or infrastructure is good. The campus is also good.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure facilities, like new labs and an auditorium. The hostel infrastructure is not good enough, but they are renovating it. Our college campus is way better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering, Gujrat.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my department and college are very good and our college work very hard on it for good attention from students for new admission. We have free Wi-Fi, and good and clean labs with all machines. We also have library and classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Overall the college has good infrastructure and average placemen
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure facilities like new labs , auditorium . The hostel infrastructure is not enough good but they are renovating. Our college campus is way more better than our college because we have all right to do whatever we want to do.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All labs, classrooms, and the library are good and spacious. They have a good atmosphere for studying. The hostel rooms provide good facilities. The food served in the mess is good. There is a huge hospital on our campus. There are many grounds for different games to play.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement, average faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: In our university, Wi-Fi is free for students in the entire campus. Computer centers are also equipped with Wi-Fi. In our campus labs, library, and classrooms are huge to accommodate a number of students together. But there are no ACs in the classrooms which creates difficulty during summers. Only 2-3 fans are available in such a big classroom. Canteen and cafeteria are also there in the campus. They provide good hygienic food. Cleanliness is key feature of our campus, workers come regularly to ...

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied with good placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in rooms are not much good. Wi-Fi is not provided. The in-time of the hostel is 7 pm. If any student is not in their room, a message will be sent to their parents. The quality of facilities in our hostel, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities, sports and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: I recommend all the students to choose Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Our department has a fantastic infrastructure. It has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and extra study rooms like common rooms for girls and boys. There are many facilities like clean rooms, sports ground, sports kits, and a canteen. One of the most attractive things is healthy food.

reviews.review_heading: There are good placements and good response from faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There are many laboratories in which there are many computers, and every computer has a high-speed internet facility. I am not a hosteller, but as per my colleagues, our college hostel is good. Rectors have good behaviour and strict regarding regulations and also take action if we violate.

reviews.review_heading: I fully satisfied with the college, they should need to take some steps to improve placements.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure was good and large enough to enjoy college life. It also provides basic facilities of Wi-Fi, the condition of labs and classrooms were good. The hostel was good enough to stay and enjoy hostel life with basic facilities like good food and water.

reviews.review_heading: Good Infrastructure with Nice and Humble faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is good and clean Infrastructure of our college sankalchand Patel college Of Engineering and Technology. We are having the good Wi-Fi strength in all over campus with good speed which is very basic need for the students of IT and Computer. In our hostel we are having good food and healthy food with good and clean tables and structure. In every room there 3 students we have also AC and Non -AC option for the students which is very good. We have different sports and also NSS and NCC in our c...

reviews.review_heading: The review of Sankalchand Patel College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good as compared to other colleges. A big library is also available here. The computer room and micro labs are available here, and there are separate labs for various subjects. Our classrooms are big and clean. A playground and techset hall are also available here.

reviews.review_heading: I think the college is very good for a student to study and have a bright future.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. A lot of facilities like a library, laboratories, and seminar rooms were available for students. There was a hostel for students to live and study. The college also has a good canteen. There was a well-maintained ground for the students to play different games.

reviews.review_heading: The college offers the best infrastructure along with quality education.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well maintained. The campus is well occupied with a beautiful garden, big parking space, two best hostels for boys and girls and a good canteen. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. There is a big library where you can find all the books. Our college has a large sports ground. There are well-maintained laboratories with high technology equipment.

college_info.intro:
T. John Institute of Technology popular programmes are MBA and BTech. BTech students are taught the basics of computer programming and networking. They are taught programming languages, computation, programme design, design & development of algorithms, computer hardware, software, and others. Students must develop some important skills such as critical thinking, creativity, good programming skills, analytical skills, problem-solving skills, strong data structures, and algorithm skills.
T. John Institute of Technology MBA students are provided dual specialisation options such as Marketing and Finance, Marketing and HR, Finance and HR, Business Analytics and Marketing, Business Analytics and HR, and Business Analytics and Finance. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by the T. John Institute of Technology. Along with this, do check the eligibility criteria and John Institute of Technology fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview:
T. John Institute of Technology (TJIT), Bangalore offers UG and PG programmes. Popular programmes are BTech/ BE in Computer Science, Information Science, Electronics and Communication, and Data Science, as well as MBA and BBA programmes.

The institute also offers PhD programmes in Computer Science & Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, and Mathematics. The total academic fees for each of these PhD programmes are INR 90 K.

faqs.answer: T. John Institute of Technology is well-known educational institution in Bangalore, India. T.John Institute of Technology, offers undergraduate engineering and computer application courses, as well as postgraduate management and computer application courses. With a dedicated research center and a team of experienced faculty members, it places a strong emphasis on research and innovation. It is important to note that college selection is influenced by a variety of factors such as location, course offerings, faculty, infrastructure, placement opportunities, and more.Almost 90% of students got placed in different reputed companies such as IBM, Infosys, etc. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Many top roles are offered for computer Science engineering, artificial intelligence, machine learning, civil engineering electronics, and communication engineering. Classes are well-maintained and have a very good atmosphere inside the TJIT campus which studenys call an assembly. It is a very reputed college in south Bangalore. The college campus is green and very beautiful. The infrastructure is excellent. The college has good classrooms. ICT facility has been provided in all the seminar halls. The library is well furnished with all the required study materials. Professors are very dedicated and committed. In the computer Science course, faculty teachers are friendly. Their teaching techniques are good. All faculty members are helpful. They use power point presentations to teach and to make students understand better. You can easily clear exams if you go through the previous exam papers of two years.
faqs.question: Q: Is T. John Institute of Technology a good option?

faqs.answer: T. John Institute of Technology admissions are competitive. The admission process for B.E. courses is based on CET and COMEDK/ AIEEE/ JEE exam scores. For Ph.D. programs, the score on the VTU entrance exam is taken into account. To apply, go to the institution's official website and fill out the application form.And Karnataka PGCET / KMAT / MAT for postgraduate programs.
faqs.question: Q: Are admissions at T. John Institute of Technology entrance-based or merit-based?

faqs.answer: T. John Institute of Technology admissions are based on the results of entrance exams such as KCET (only for Karnataka students) or COMEDK/AIEEE/JEE Entrance for UG programs and Karnataka PGCET/KMAT/MAT for PG programs. T. John Institute of Technology in Bangalore accepts entrance exam scores from the COMEDK UGET and KCET for admission to its Bachelor of Engineering (BE) program. A minimum of 45% in 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects is required for admission to the BE program.

overview_faqs.question: Is T. John Institute of Technology a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: T. John Institute of Technology is well-known educational institution in Bangalore, India. T.John Institute of Technology, offers undergraduate engineering and computer application courses, as well as postgraduate management and computer application courses. With a dedicated research center and a team of experienced faculty members, it places a strong emphasis on research and innovation. It is important to note that college selection is influenced by a variety of factors such as location, course offerings, faculty, infrastructure, placement opportunities, and more.Almost 90% of students got placed in different reputed companies such as IBM, Infosys, etc. The highest salary package offered is 30 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 10 LPA. Many top roles are offered for computer Science engineering, artificial intelligence, machine learning, civil engineering electronics, and communication engineering. Classes are well-maintained and have a very good atmosphere inside the TJIT camp

overview_faqs.question: How is life at T. John Institute of Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: Life at T.John Institute of Technology is very deciplined and healthy. Classes are well-maintained and have a very good atmosphere inside the TJIT campus which Students call an assembly. It is a very reputed college in south Bangalore. The college campus is green and very beautiful. The infrastructure is excellent. The college has good classrooms. ICT facility has been provided in all the seminar halls. The library is well furnished with all the required study materials. Professors are very dedicated and committed. In the computer Science course, faculty teachers are friendly. Their teaching techniques are good. All faculty members are helpful. They use power point presentations to teach and to make students understand better. Students can easily clear exams if they go through the previous exam papers of two years and attend the regular classes.

overview_faqs.question: How costly is T. John Institute of Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: T. John Institute of Technology is a of the best Engineering College in Bangalore. TJIT offers plenty of courses with global level education system. I have mentioned the fee for various B.Tech courses of TJIT below :B.E/B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering Costs around 5.7L .B.E/ Tech in Information Science and Engineering Costs around 5.45 L.B.E/B.Tech in Electronic Communication Engineering costs around 5.45 L.B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering costs around 5.25 L.B.E/B.Tech in Civil Engineering costs around 5.2 L.

admission_overview.title: T. John Institute of Technology Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: T. John Institute of Technology admissions are entrance-based. T. John Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main, AIEEE/ COMEDK for admission to BTech course. The seat allotment is done through the counselling process. The institute also provides lateral entry to the BTech course. To be eligible for the BTech programme at TJIT, the aspiring candidates need to have a minimum of 45% in class 12.

admission_process.title: T. John Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: T. John Institute of Technology admission process for the BTech course of 2025 is open. Students meet the eligibility criteria, admission requirements and others.
1- Application Process
For BTech course admission students can apply online and offline. The accepted entrance exams like COMEDK, AIEEE, or JEE Main.
2- Selection Rounds

T. John Institute of Technology shortlists students against their performance in COMEDK, JEE Main, or AIEEE. The institute accepts valid scores in any of these tests to determine eligibility and prepare the merit list. Depending on the scores, students are called for further admission processes.
3- Final Admission

After shortlisting, the students have to enrol for the counselling round by the respective authority. Final seat allotment is made through counselling on merit, preference, and availability of seats. After being allotted a seat, students have to join the institute, provide their original documents for verification. For the Final admission, the aspiring candidates must pay theTJIT fee.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for BTech at T. John Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: T. John Institute of Technology adopts an entrance mode of admission for BTech. Students should apply online and perform well in exams such as JEE Main, COMEDK, or AIEEE. Candidates are shortlisted based on entrance scores to undergo counselling and seat allotment. Final admission follows document verification and payment of the fee.

faqs.question: Does T. John Institute of Technology offer lateral entry to the BTech programme?
faqs.answer: Yes, T. John Institute of Technology provides lateral entry admission to the BTech program. Diploma holders in engineering or equivalent can apply. They are taken directly into the second year of the program, depending on eligibility and seat availability. Admissions through lateral entry also have a merit-based selection process.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by T. John Institute of Technology for admission?
faqs.answer: T. John Institute of Technology admissions are based on the results of entrance exams such as KCET (only for Karnataka students) or COMEDK/AIEEE/JEE Entrance for UG programs and Karnataka PGCET/KMAT/MAT for PG programs.T. John Institute of Technology in Bangalore accepts entrance exam scores from the COMEDK UGET and KCET for admission to its Bachelor of Engineering (BE) program. A minimum of 45% in 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics as compulsory subjects is required for admission to the BE program.

placement_data.title: T John Institute of Technology Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Placement Cell at T. JOHN GROUP OF INSTITUTIONS actively works to create job opportunities for graduating students. Our strong connections with the industry aid in securing final placements, internships, and various projects for students.

Companies like Oracle, Microsoft, HCL, TCS, Accenture, IBM, Mphasis, Wipro, HP, HAL, Unisys, Capgemini, CMC, Convergys, Accord Software, Trident Hilton, The Woods Manor, Taj Residency, HTMT, Hotel Grand Ashok, Royal Orchid, Le Meridian, J.W. Marriott Dubai, ITC Hotel, Biocon, Glaxo, Dr. Reddys, Srilanka Mass Inimates, Gokuldas Apparels Pvt. Ltd., Leela Scottish, Envision, Malayala Manorama, Asianet, Tv9, St. Johns Hospital, Apollo Hospital, Narayana Hrudalaya, Lee Maedos, Dr. Agarwal’s Health Care, Natco Pharma Ltd ., and others are involved.
A JOB Fair was held at TJGI, attracting 25 companies and about 5000 students for placements.

faqs.question: Does T. John Institute of Technology have good placements?
faqs.answer: The placement cell at T. John Institute of Technology organizes regular placement workshops and seminars to help students build their professional network. In addition, the placement cell organizes visits to potential employers, industry visits, and on-campus interviews to expose students to the real working environment. In 2021, the average package offered to students was 3.5 Lacs INR. The most expensive package was 7.5 Lacs INR, while the cheapest was 2.5 Lacs INR. Infosys, TCS, HCL Technologies, and many other leading companies have participated in recent T. John Institute of Technology placements.

individual_reviews.title: Good college for scholars.

content.Placements: In computer engineering, in B.Tech, more than 85 percent of students got placements. The average package offered is 4 LPA. The highest package is around 13 LPA, and the lowest package is around 3 LPA. Many IT companies like Wipro, IBM, and Oracle offered post of SDE and internships.

The room is good. Food is okay in the mess.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It has good infrastructure, okay placements, skilled faculty, a good location, and value for money.

content.Placements: Being located in the tech hub of Hinjewadi, there is never a lack of companies for placements. For the year 2024-25, the highest package offered by Infosys and Oracle is 10 LPA. The average package is 6 LPA. Many companies like TCS, Wipro, AWS, Tech Mahindra, Bosch and L&T, and Mindtree visit the college for placements. Overall, placements here are decent but not great.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure would be one of the best parts of this college. It is a decent size of 12 acres with a green and open campus. Everything from the academic building, classrooms, and the research center building (we have a whole building for that) to the library and cafeteria feels modern and spacious. We get parking facilities as well as a basketball court, multipurpose ground and a volleyball net too. Due to less student intake, the campus feels open and not too crowded. Hostel facilities are good too with 1, 2 and 3 bedroom sharing options.

admission_overview.college_name: International Institute of Information Technology Pune Admission 2025: Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: I2IT Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: I2IT Pune admission process 2025is conducted online and the admissions are given as per theentrance test scores. International Institute of Information Technology Pune givesEngineeringcourses at theUG level. TheI2IT Puneis affiliated with the Savitribai Phule Pune University and the college has got approval from the AICTE. The college has received recognition from the DTE, Govt. of Maharashtra.

Admission to the I2IT Pune programme is based on the score a student gets inJEE Mains or MHCET. All the candidates can register on the official website of the State Common Entrance Test Cell, Gov of Maharashtra.
Particulars
I2IT Pune Admission 2024 Highlights

Candidates who wish to joinI2IT Pune BE coursesalso have the option to get admission directly to the second year. Candidates must meet the eligibility criteria and appear for the relevant entrance test. The table showcases the eligibility and selection criteria for theI2IT Pune BE programme:
Eligibility

Cleared Class 12 with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/Biotechnology/ Informatics Practices/ Biology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Computer Science / Information Technology/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Electronics/ Entrepreneurship as compulsory subjects & obtained a min. of 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)
3-years of Diploma in Eng. & Technology with a min. of 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category students)
JEE Mains/ MHT-CET
Passed 2 or 3-years of Diploma Course inEng& Technology with a min. 45% marks (40% for reserved category)
Graduate in BSc from a recognised University & cleared Class 12th with a min. 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)
Cleared DVoc in the related sector

I2IT Pune Admission process is conducted by the State Common Entrance Test Cell, and the merit list is prepared on the basis of marks scored in JEE Mains or MH CET. The step-wise detailed admission process of I2IT Pune is mentioned below:
Step 1:Registration

First of all, it is mandatory to register on the official website of the State Common Entrance Test Cell with all necessary documents and verification of documents and confirmation of application with the Facilitation Centre
Step 2:Merit list
After appearing for the exam, there will be a Final Merit list released on the official website of the State CET Cell.
Step 3: Institute-level Application
Candidates should submit an online CAP Round 1 Choice selection form
Step 4:Seat Confirmation
Candidates can check the seat allotment list on the official website. 80% of seats will be allotted through the 'Central Admission Process', and 20% of seats will be allotted by the I2I Pune.
Step 5: Reporting
Physical Reporting at the Allotted Institute and Confirmation of Admission by submitting required documents and fees.

placement_data.title: I2IT Pune Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The 2025 placement drive is ongoing. The highest package recorded so far is INR 12 LPA . The list of leading companies that have visited the campus for I2IT Pune placements 2025 included Oracle, BOSCH, Infosys , and many others. In all 43 companies offered placements and internships to students during International Institute of Information Technology Pune placements 2025.

Earlier, 18 companies visited the campus during I2IT Pune placements and offered handsome packages to the students of the 2024 batch. The I2IT Pune highest package offered in 2024 stood at INR 9.50 LPA . Further, the median and average packages offered stood at INR 9.34 LPA and INR 8.11 LPA , respectively. Oracle, Persistent Systems, Elastic Run , and many other renowned companies participated in the International Institute of Information Technology Pune placements 2024.
