hostel_campus.college_name: International Institute of Information Technology Pune Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Library: The library has a collection of over 2 Lacs books and journals. It also has a number of electronic resources, such as e-books, e-journals, and online databases.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for scholars.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is top-notch, and the hostels are not that good, but still okay. Triple-sharing rooms are available for first-year students, and from next year, double-sharing is also available. We have a water cooler on every floor and a LAN port to get Wi-Fi in every room. The room is good. Food is okay in the mess.

reviews.review_heading: Very good faculty, decent job placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good Wi-Fi range. Classrooms are well cleaned and are cleaned daily. Library is quite big and silent. It is a very good place for students to study for their exams. For sports, we can play after 4.30 PM, and are not allowed to play before 4.30 PM.

reviews.review_heading: If you are ready to study, then this will be a good option for you.
reviews.review_text: College campus is not that big, but it is placed in one of the prime locations of Pune, Hinjewadi. It's a short but beautiful campus with green trees and a natural vibe. There's nice Wi-Fi connectivity around the campus, and the college provides some good facilities like 2-3 canteens, a library, and more.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty good for studying students, supportive faculty, rather than average placement, all is good.
reviews.review_text: By far the best campus in Pune, except for the private ones. The campus is small but full of trees and nature vibes, and the hostels are not up to mark, but okay. Sports facilities are average, a college has a small ground. Sports like basketball, TT, badminton, football, and volleyball are the main sports.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure, okay placements, skilled faculty, a good location, and value for money.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure would be one of the best parts of this college. It is a decent size of 12 acres with a green and open campus. Everything from the academic building, classrooms, and the research center building (we have a whole building for that) to the library and cafeteria feels modern and spacious. We get parking facilities as well as a basketball court, multipurpose ground and a volleyball net too. Due to less student intake, the campus feels open and not too crowded. Hostel facilities...

reviews.review_heading: Excellent academics, supportive faculty members, and great campus life.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of our college is very good and has a friendly environment. All facilities are available like Wi-Fi, pure water, and washing machines. We have a good playground to play games like kabaddi and cricket. Good quality food is given to students. During emergencies, doctors always live in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: There is also a research building which adds up to make college more special.
reviews.review_text: The college has a decent atmosphere, with lots of trees on the campus. There is Wi-Fi on the whole campus, a library with all kinds of books, classrooms with digital boards and good ventilation, and the best hostel and it was a great experience with all the facilities we needed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of International Institute of Information Technology.
reviews.review_text: The library is very spacious and has a wide variety of books as per our requirements. The classrooms are digital, and labs have computers from good companies and also provide Wi-Fi. The sports committee tries to teach new sports. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: The placement and coding environment are good.
reviews.review_text: Currently, our college is operating from the temporary campus of Sinhgad College, and next year, our college will get its permanent campus. The infrastructure is quite average. The hostel is very clean, and free Wi-Fi is available all the time. Because of the temporary campus, we don't have sports grounds to play on. There are no medical facilities in our hostel, although there are many shops nearby to get anything you want. The mess has improved gradually, and the food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good college for students having 90-93 percentile.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-maintained infrastructure and the labs are also well-equipped. Wi-Fi is available all over campus, as is the very well-established Central Library. The hostel has clean, spacious, and well-maintained rooms, as well as a laundry system. The rooms are available for triple sharing, double and single sharing.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfactory coding culture, amazing placements and internships but average college and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are not so good, but despite the fact that there are no permanent campus facilities provided by the institute, they seem manageable. Wi-Fi is above average in both the hostel and campus; in the library, all the books related to the course are available and new books are added every year; classrooms are average; the quality of food in the mess is average (not so good nor bad); and sports facilities are very limited.

reviews.review_heading: Good college if you're willing to work upon yourself by your own.
reviews.review_text: The campus has Wi-Fi and classrooms are a little dull but has enough ventilation. Hostels are great they have washrooms and bathroom in each room separately means they do not have to share it with anyone except their roommates. The hostel has a very friendly environment and wardens are good .

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus has Wi-Fi. Our college has a huge library, a study room, a hostel, and a digital library. We can borrow books or research papers from the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college in Pune with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent infrastructure. The library is excellent. The college has good atmosphere. The infrastructure of the hostel is not good. The quality of the food is average.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with well maintained infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is very big and well maintained infrastructure. The academic building is very nice. There is also a big cafeteria inside the campus. Many different laboratories are available for different subjects. There is a huge library with many books. The hostel is quite good and well maintained.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about International Institute of Information Technology, Pune

likes.text: Many companies like Accolite, Infosys, Bookmyshow, Persistent, Savvy Software and much more visited the campus.
The top recruiters that visited the campus for placements were Elastic run, HDFC bank, IBM, Infosys.

likes.text: They even have badminton court, basketball court, football ground, cricket field and indoor games such as chess, carrom and table tennis as well.

I2IT Pune offers scholarships to students as financial assistance. Scholarship is an integral part of the admission process at ISquareIT. The below-mentioned are the scholarships available at I2IT Pune:

International Institute of Information Technology Pune is not a costly college. The total tuition fee for the B.E. course is INR 3.9 lakh. This fee is exclusive of various charges such as transportation charges, hostel charges, and others. The fee is quite affordable. Even if the students feel that the fee is quite high, worry not apply for scholarships provided by the college.

college_info.intro:
Narasaraopeta Engineering College offers courses at the UG and PG levels for a duration varying from 2 years to 4 years. The Institute offers courses such as BTech and MBA, as popular among others. review_summary.college_name: Narasaraopeta Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Partially satisfied because of the faculty members and facilities.

content.Placements: I am an EEE graduate from this college. For EEE graduates, placements are very weak. They can't bring good companies to us. Small startup companies will come every year with the worst roles. Every company can't offer more than 3 LPA. For our EEE graduates, the top company we get is Lybsis Inc., the top role is solar technical analyst. Our college charges Rs. 30,000 for providing placements to students. Whether it is a good or bad company, you need to pay Rs. 30,000 after being placed in any company. 20 out of 120 candidates selected in our batch. Most of them are not interested in those companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The best college and a number of facilities for students.

content.Placements: In my course, Computer Science and Engineering, there are nearly 250 students. Of the 250 students, 50 are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, and the highest package is 6 LPA. The top company that hires many people is Savanti's Solutions. All students are getting internships for different platforms like DataVally. The top role offering in my course has been developed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very pleasant and cool. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is available, outing is available, canteen is available, and stationery, all the things that students need are available on my campus. Food is very hygienic. Morning tiffin, afternoon lunch with 2 curries, evening snacks and night dinner with curry, sambar, curd with pickles.

individual_reviews.title: My college is good for studying.

content.Placements: Maybe 80% of students have been placed on campus. The highest package is 13 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. The top recruiting company is Accenture. Top roles in my course are web developer, software developer, computer system analyst, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is 70% good. I mean, average. The overall infrastructure is average. The Wi-Fi signal is weak. The library is good, and they provide different types of books in the central library of the college. Coming to hostel food, it is not very good, as you would expect, so it's better to join outside the campus. It is better to prefer outside hostels.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Strong infrastructure and decent placements, but faculty support needs improvement.

content.Placements: I am from the 2020 to 2025 B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering batch. In our course, 75 to 80% of students are placed. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, the lowest package is 3.2LPA, and the average package stood at 5 to 6LPA. Some of the top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, Capgemini, and HCL, along with a few product based startups. 60% of students got internships, mostly through companies like TCS iON, Infosys Springboard, Cognizant, Wipro, and some local startups via college tie ups.

admission_process.title: Narasaraopeta Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Narasaraopeta Engineering College admissionsare merit-based. The institution evaluates the score of the candidates in the last qualifying exam for admission.Narasaraopeta Engineering Collegeoffers various courses which includes BTech, MTech, MBA, and MCA. Courses offered here are in affiliation withJawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada. Candidates can apply online for their preferred programme byNarasaraopeta Engineering Collegeor reach out to the admission office for offline admission.

Narasaraopeta Engineering College offers various courses in the field of Engineering at both the UG and the PG course levels. Candidates are required to participate in the admission process to get a chance at securing a seat in their desired course. The courses are offered in a full-time/ offline mode. Learn more about the highlights of the college through the table given below:
Particulars
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
10+ courses in various specialisations
How to apply?
https://www.nrtec.in/admission-procedure
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Narasaraopeta Engineering College offers a variety of UG and PG courses for interested candidates in the field of Engineering. Candidates wishing to apply for admissions are required to meet the eligibility criteria and follow the selection process to stand a chance at getting the final admission offer. The table below showcases theNarasaraopeta Engineering College courseeligibility and selection criteria.
Class 12 with at least45% aggregate,with PCM as main subjects
Bachelor's degree with at least50% aggregatein a relevant course
GATE/ AP PGECET
Bachelor's degree with at least50% aggregate
Bachelor's degree with at least50% aggregate

Narasaraopeta Engineering College admissions begin with registration. Candidates need to apply for the course of their choice and for the entrance exam that is required. Candidates are shortlisted for admission through candidates performance in the entrance exams. The step-wise admission process to get a seat in the Narasaraopeta Engineering College is mentioned below:
STEP 1: Narasaraopeta Engineering College Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply to various UG and PG courses in the field of Engineering based on their eligibility. Candidates must fill out the application form with accurate details regarding their personal and academic life. Candidates are required to separately apply for entrance exams as well. Candidates must download the application form once the fee is paid in order to keep for future reference.
STEP 2: Selection and Shortlisting

The college considers various entrance exam scores, such as APICET and AP PGCET, etc for admission to the MTech, BTech, and other courses. Candidates who are shortlisted based on their rank in the entrance exams are invited for further admission rounds or to pay the course fee to secure their seat.
STEP 3: Merit List and Admission Confirmation

After the release of theNarasaraopeta Engineering College cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theNEC feeto confirm their seats in the university.

courses_data.description: A four-year, full-time Bachelor of Technology (BTech) programme is available at NEC. For NECs BTech programme, eligible candidates must have received a good result in the AP EAMCET. The admission process for the course is entrance-based and candidates are required to appear for the entrance to stand a chance at being shortlisted for the programme. Candidates must make sure to pay the course fee if they qualify for the admission process. Candidates are required to meet the eligibility criteria for the course that is to have a minimum of 45% aggregate in Class 12.

courses_data.name: Narasaraopeta Engineering College MTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Candidates can pursue atwo-yearMTechpostgraduate degree at Narasaraopeta Engineering College. Computer Science Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Power Engineering, and Structural Engineering are among the five specializations in which the course is offered. Admission to the program is entirely determined by the Candidates' merit scores from their most recent coursework or approved test. For admission to MTech programs, candidates who are accepted must pay a total tuition cost of INR 1 lakh. Candidates must also fulfill the eligibility requirements to apply for the course.

courses_data.name: Narasaraopeta Engineering College MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Narasaraopeta Engineering Collegeoffers a2-year MBAprogramme at the PG level. The selection for MBA/PGDM is based on a valid score in APICET. Additionally, candidates who seek admission to this course must ensure that they fulfil the eligibility criteria, which is a minimum of 50%  aggregate in graduation. Candidates must make sure to check the eligibility criteria and the selection criteria in order to successfully participate in the admission process.

Candidates must participate in the entrance-based admission process for securing a seat in the course.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied because of the faculty members and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure will be average. We have a good library with good books. Wi-Fi is not there. Labs are good. But there's no use in having good labs. Because faculty members don't teach how to do activities in the lab, we can copy the values. Not every lab in charge is like that. 3 out of 10 lab in charges are good and genuine. I am a day scholar. But according to my information, hostel food is average. For the hostel, they are charging more money per year. After the first year of co...

reviews.review_heading: The best college and a number of facilities for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very pleasant and cool. In the hostel, Wi-Fi is available, outing is available, canteen is available, and stationery, all the things that students need are available on my campus. Food is very hygienic. Morning tiffin, afternoon lunch with 2 curries, evening snacks and night dinner with curry, sambar, curd with pickles.

reviews.review_heading: My college is good for studying.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is 70% good. I mean, average. The overall infrastructure is average. The Wi-Fi signal is weak. The library is good, and they provide different types of books in the central library of the college. Coming to hostel food, it is not very good, as you would expect, so it's better to join outside the campus. It is better to prefer outside hostels.

reviews.review_heading: Actually, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is 70% good, I mean average. The overall infrastructure is average. Wi-Fi signal is weak. Library is good and they provide different types of books in the central library in college. Coming to hostel, the food is not much good as you expect, so it's better to join outside the campus. It is better to prefer outside hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure and decent placements, but faculty support needs improvement.
reviews.review_text: Our CSE department has good facilities overall. The labs are well equipped with updated systems, reliable internet, and the whole campus had Wi-Fi access. Classrooms are spacious with projectors and decent seating. The library is well maintained with a good collection of technical books, journals, and e resources. In terms of hostel facilities, rooms are clean and fairly comfortable, though sometimes a bit crowded. The mess food is average. Manageable, but not great , the canteen has better opti...

reviews.review_heading: Narasaraopeta Engineering College fosters innovation, excellence, and bright careers for students.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available in lab sessions only, not in the classrooms. The labs are organized with a well-structured infrastructure and systems for work. Classrooms are big and neat to survive. In the library, we have to choose from many books to gain pace and knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Narasaraopeta Engineering College (Autonomous).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is excellent. The infrastructure of our hostel is nice, and it provides good food with morning milk and evening snacks. Overall our course and college hostel is nice and excellent.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC think placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different laboratories, none of which depend on the other department's labs. All departments' books are available in the library. In the hostel, good quality food is provided. Weekly 2 twice government nurses come to our college to supply tablets.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC, think placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different laboratories, none of which depend on the other department labs. All department books are available in the library. In the hostel, good quality food is provided. Every two weeks, government nurses come to our college to supply tables.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC, think placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has different laboratories, one of which depends on other department labs. All department books are available in the library. In the hostel, good quality food is provided. Twice a week, government nurses come to our college to supply tables.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, and decent placements with opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has spacious, well-ventilated, and equipped with LCD projectors/smart boards to support interactive learning. For CSE programming labs, networking lab, and AI & ML labs are available. For ECE, electronics lab, communication lab, and VLSI Lab are available. For mechanical, CAD/CAM labs, workshops, thermal and fluid mechanics labs are available. It has rich collection of textbooks, journals, magazines, and reference materials. It has access to e-resources such as IEEE, Springer, J-Gate...

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Good, not bad. The quality of the facilities in our hostel, the quality of food available in the mess and canteen, sports and games, is good, not bad.

reviews.review_heading: The climate is too cool. The infrastructure facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure facility was not bad, but compared to other colleges near us, it is very nice. Sports are also conducted, like chess, football, cricket, and volleyball. In hostels, the water facility is good, but in the mess, the food quality is good for others as well.

reviews.review_heading: Think NEC, think placement.
reviews.review_text: In our college, every department has different laboratory that depends on the other department's lab. Department books are available in library. In the hostel, good quality is provided. Weekly 2 times government nurse come to hostel in our college. It provides good safety for girls hostel, and every day clean the room. Boys hostel cleaning every day is good measure of the hostel in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Curriculum in Narasaraopet Engineering College is very good and changes over time.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of Narasaraopet Engineering College hostel are very good and hygienic. Labs are very nice. Food in the canteen is very good and hygienic. Medical facilities are available in the Narasaraopet Engineering College.

A very good college for job seekers and as it is an autonomous college placements will be more for the students as per their knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: There is good education in this college, and they also offer good placements.

review_content.Placements: The college claims 100% placement, and they have made a separate cell for placements. It includes B.Tech and MBA placements. There are many placement cells in our college, like Infosys, and many more, and there is also a research lab for interested students.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college is good to see and has good ventilation. Our college is among greenery, and it is also recognized as a green building. You can see the plants and the maintenance of them. The classrooms have projectors for a better explanation of the topics. There is also Wi-Fi available which can be accessed by our registration number.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, the college is not good. If anybody wants to take admission, please don't.

review_content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed. The minimum package is around 2 LPA, and the highest package is around 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Samsung, Intel, Alstom, Corporate, Crompton, Wipro, etc. Around 40% of students got internships from our course at Wipro, Apple, and many other companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are good, but the Wi-Fi is very slow. Classrooms are average, and the library is good enough. Food quality is not good; they don't provide non-vegetarian or vegetarian food in proper quantities. Medical facilities are not good. Sports and games facilities are really very good. Mess food is the worst.

review_summary.college_name: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Great value with strong placement and vibrant campus life.

content.Placements: Civil engineering saw a relatively lower enrolment, approximately 15-25 students in each batch compared to other courses. Placement have been 95% from the college and 100% last year average package would be around 3.5 LPA, the highest was 12 LPA, and the lowest was 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is attractive and comfortable and all the equipment and labs required are available. The food may not be so good same food for the next 4 years will be hard. Hospital and medical facilities are not compromised. Sports are supported in this college. Swimming pool and other indoor activities are all available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Faculty members are good and strict in internal and external exams.

content.Placements: On our campus, 80-90% of the students got placed in my course. The highest package is 11 LPA. The average package ranges from 5-7 LPA. The lowest salary package ranges from 3.5-4 LPA. MNCs visited our campus to hire students from my course. Companies like Accenture, Infosys, TCS, IBM, Tech Mahindra, EY, Quality Kiosk, SYX(Mumbai), 99Games, and Signdesk visit the college to hire students. 70-80% of students got internship opportunities from our campus and full-time jobs in companies like IBM, Signdesk, Bosch, Toyota, etc. Roles like consultant service, associate software engineer, full-stack developed, web developed, and lab intern are offered to students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: There is good education in this college, and they also offer good placements.

content.Placements: The college claims 100% placement, and they have made a separate cell for placements. It includes B.Tech and MBA placements. There are many placement cells in our college, like Infosys, and many more, and there is also a research lab for interested students.
content.Infrastructure: The college is good to see and has good ventilation. Our college is among greenery, and it is also recognized as a green building. You can see the plants and the maintenance of them. The classrooms have projectors for a better explanation of the topics. There is also Wi-Fi available which can be accessed by our registration number.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is not good. If anybody wants to take admission, please don't.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed. The minimum package is around 2 LPA, and the highest package is around 24 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Samsung, Intel, Alstom, Corporate, Crompton, Wipro, etc. Around 40% of students got internships from our course at Wipro, Apple, and many other companies.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are good, but the Wi-Fi is very slow. Classrooms are average, and the library is good enough. Food quality is not good; they don't provide non-vegetarian or vegetarian food in proper quantities. Medical facilities are not good. Sports and games facilities are really very good. Mess food is the worst.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: So happy to be in this college.

content.Placements: Campus placement drives will take place regularly, and prior training will also be provided. College also hosts Udhyoga Mels and placement drives like Alvas Pragathi, which ensures most students are placed. Many top companies also conduct drives in the college.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are well maintained and well structured. Labs have good infrastructure and necessary instruments. There is a digital library in the college. Hostel is comfortable and close to the college. Hostel is quite strict. Good medical facilities are available.

admission_overview.title: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology admissions are offered to UG & PG courses in the stream of Engineering and Management. Students can pursue BTech and MBA courses in multiple specialisations. AIET admissions are entirely entrance-based, followed by a personal Interview round. The college accepts scores of various state/ national-level entrance exams such as KCET, KMAT, PGCET, MAT, etc. for admission to respective courses. Moreover, application forms are filled in an online mode on the official website of Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology. Read the following article to know more about AIET admission 2026.

eligibility_selection.title: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology Eligibility & Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: AIET admissions to UG & PG courses are based on valid entrance scores. Along with that, candidates must also fulfil the minimum eligibility requirements for the respective courses. Check below the course-wise eligibility & selection criteria for AIET course admission 2026:

courses_table.eligibility: Pass Class 12 in the relevant stream from a recognised board
Pass graduation in the relevant disciplines from a recognised board

admission_process.title: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Check below the detailed steps for Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology admission process for BTech and MBA courses:
1: Application

The application process for Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology is conducted in an online mode. Candidates can apply online on the college's official website. Along with that, they must submit the important documents and an application fee to finalise the application process.
2: Selection Rounds

Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology admission is entirely entrance-based for UG & PG courses. For the BTech course, candidates must qualify for the KCET or COMED-K entrance exam. Whereas for an MBA, they must qualify for either PGCET/ CAT/ MAT/ KMAT. Candidates are shortlisted based on the application and entrance exam scores and called for the PI round. Candidates must carry hard copies of documents at the time of appearing for the interview.
3: Final Admission

Candidates are notified about their selection. The selected candidates must pay the registration or full fees within seven working days after receiving the confirmation from AIET. They must also submit a photocopy of all the documents as proof at the time of admission.

courses_data.description: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology offers MBA course for a duration of two-years. Admission to this course is based on scores of PGCET, CAT, MAT and KMAT scores. Candidates must qualify for any one of the respective entrance exam in order to secure admission.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam for admission to MBA at AIET?
faqs.answer: Yes, AIET admission to MBA is entrance-based. The college admits students based on scores of national/ state-level entrance exam. Aspirants must qualify for either PGCET/ KMAT/ CAT/ MAT entrance exams. Further, they also need to appear for PI round to get admission.

faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at AIET?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for MBA at AIET is INR 1.2 lakh. Candidates must pay the course fee at the time of admission. As this information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. Candidates are advised to visit the official website for detailed fee structure.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to UG and PG courses at AIET?
faqs.answer: No, AIET admission is entirely entrance-based. Direct admission is not valid for UG & PG courses at the college. Aspirants need to qualify for any state/ national-level entrance exams such as PGECT, KCET, MAT, CAT, etc.,   for admission to respective courses. The final selection will be based on entrance exam scores and candidates' performance in PI round.

faqs.question: What is the fee for UG and PG courses at AIET?
faqs.answer: AIET fee structure includes Tuition Fee, Registration Fee, etc. Candidates must pay the course fee at the time of admission to confirm their seats for the respective courses. placement_data.title: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The Institute has a Training and Placement Department that looks after the overall placement activities, training and execution of the placement drive under the supervision of heads of department. The department arranges soft skill & personality development programs, workshops on Interview techniques and grooming them to make quick learners, versatile, good team players, possess relevant skill sets and technically competent technocrats.

During the 2024 placements, over 367 job offers were distributed among the 314 students placed . The total count of participating companies was above 163 . Apart from this, over 863 internships were attracted during Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology placements 2024.

cut_off.college_name: Alva's Institute of Engineering and Technology Cutoff 2025: Check Karnataka PGCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Alvas Engineering College cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Alvas Engineering College Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 28099 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 27535 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Alvas Engineering College. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 28099 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 9328, while in 2023, it was 16372.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.

Alvas Engineering College accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning has the lowest cutoff rank of 68629 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 75287, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:

According to the Alvas Engineering College B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) stood at 56170 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.

The college also offers outdoor sports facilities to students such as Volleyball, Football, Basketball, Cricket, etc. and has digitalised classrooms all over.

BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies such as Google, Microsoft, TCS, Accenture, Infosys, IBM, Amazon, Wipro, and others. BTech and various other course students benefit from extensive placement support, including training in technical skills, soft skills, and interview preparation. BTech students can become Engineers or can go for fields such as Data Science, Software Testing, and others. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and fee:

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Arya College of Engineering and IT offers UG and PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Engineering, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers BTech courses to students. BTech is provided in 6 specialisations, namely Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, and others. At the PG level, the college offers MTech and MBA courses to students. MTech is provided in 3 specialisations, namely Computer Science and Engineering, Digital Communication, and Power Systems. Students opting for the MBA can choose from any specialisations, namely HR/ Marketing/ Finance/ Information Systems. Below mentioned are some of the and their respective eligibility and :

faqs.answer: A:    Sure, if you will follow admission criteria you can enroll directly in Arya College of Engineering and IT.Admissions Process: JEE Mains, UPSEE, and other entrance exams are among the methods used by Arya College to select applicants.Students with exceptional 12th board exam results (typically 90%+ aggregate) are also eligible for direct admission.You can find out if this direct admission pathway is available at Arya College website.If you have already finished a Diploma or degree programme in engineering, you might be qualified for admission through lateral entry, which enables direct entry into your second year of study.
faqs.question: Can I join Arya College of Engineering and IT directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Your JEE score is not a must to get admitted to B.Tech. in  Arya College of Engineering and IT.  You can also get admitted with your class 12 percentages provides it is from CBSE or RBSE board and more than 45%. You can also be admitted based on your REAP score. Also, to get admission in Arya College of Engineering and IT check the college website for further details.
faqs.question: Is JEE required for B.Tech at Arya College of Engineering and IT?

faqs.answer: A:    The eligibility criteria for admissions to MBA courses at Arya College of Engineering and Information Technology, Jaipur is that a candidate should hold a graduate degree (10+ 2+ 3) or equivalent with at least 50% marks or above (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC non- creamy layer students) in aggregate from a recognised board/ university. The college offers admissions on 60 seats for MBA in Human Resources and Development, Information Technology, Business Analytics, Marketing, Finance and Operations and Supply Chain. 70 percentile in CAT is a good score for admissions at Arya college, however, this totally depends on the current cut- off released by the college.

reviews_list.review_title: Decent placements, infrastructure, supportive facility but course needs updating.

review_content.Placements: In Computer Science course, around 40–50 percent of the students get placed, and the highest package of this year is around 8 LPA. The average package revolves around 4–5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, RoboMQ, Intentech, and much more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are quite good. Wi-Fi is available (Bangon). Classrooms are well organized. Library is present, but timing for girls is 9:00 PM in the campus. The food quality of the mess is good. Sports ground, games, and medical facilities are present in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College is decent in terms of infrastructure, but it should improve in terms of placements.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50-60 percent of students got placed this year. The highest package offered is 12 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. The average package offered is 5 LPA in the computer science and engineering branch. Some of the top recruiting companies of CSE are Infosys, TCS, In Time Tec, RoboMQ, Juspay, Rubrick, etc. The percentage of students who get internships from CSE is 45-50 percent in various companies and startups, like Infosys (virtual internship). Top roles offered are software developer, analyst, and sales executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure on our campus are quite good. Smart classrooms are quite good, but we don't have Wi-Fi in classrooms. However, we have Wi-Fi in the campus area. We have 2 libraries on campus, one of which is the advanced resource learning centre, in which student spend their time reading books and enhancing their skills. Hostels are well-maintained. The quality of food is good, but it becomes very tasteless at night. 24x7 medical facilities are available for students. We also have indoor and outdoor sports facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: The placements are high, but not everyone gets placed.

review_content.Placements: 20 students get placed. The highest package is 45 LPA. The lowest package is 3.20 LPA. The average package ranges between 4 and 5 LPA. Companies like Tata Motors, Flipkart, and Mahindra offer roles in my course. Only 20% of students get internships in my course, and various roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are 6 facilities available for teaching in the mechanical branch. There are four labs and 2 classrooms for the mechanical branch. The quality of the food is nice. There are three clubs for sports, culture, etc. Many facilities are available in every hostel. There are 12 hostels here.

overview_faqs.answer: Arya College of Engineering and IT provides safe and secure environment to students. The campus is quite safe and offers various facilities to students such as a temple, a cafeteria, a hostel building, a playground, a parking lot, a park, and others. admission_overview.college_name: Arya College of Engineering and IT Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Application Process

admission_process.title: Arya College of Engineering & Information Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Arya College of Engineering & Information Technology admission2025 is open. UG and PG admission processes differ depending on the stream. The college offers BTech, MTech, and MBA programmes across multiple specialisations. Admission to the courses offered at the college is primarily entrance-based. Candidates can apply for admission to their course of choice in online mode by visiting the official website.

Admission toArya College of Engineering & Information Technology coursesis based on a valid score obtained by the candidates in the JEE Main, GATE, or CAT exams along with other selection rounds for the respective courses. Admission to all the courses offered by the college is subject to merit in the entrance exam, selection rounds, and past academics. The following table mentions eligibility and selection criteria for all programmes:

Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% in case of SC/ ST/ NCL-OBC/ NCL-MBC candidates) with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with Chemistry/ Biotechnology/ Computer Science/ Technical Vocational subject/ Biology as one of the subjects
JEE Main+ Merit in Class 12
Graduation in a relevant field with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved category) from a recognised university/ institute
GATE+ Merit in Graduation
Bachelor’s degree with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for reserved category) from a recognised university
CAT+ Merit in Graduation

The admission process for Arya College of Engineering & Information Technology is a multi-step process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, offline admission process, and document verification. A step-by-step process that students need to follow is as follows:
STEP 1: Application Process

Candidates can fill out theArya College of Engineering & Information Technology application formon the official website for the respective course accepting exam as given above. The registration fee for all programmes varies as per the counselling bodies & official website of the college.
STEP 2: Selection Process 2025

Candidates who've applied for any course at Arya College of Engineering & Information Technology must appear for the respective entrance exams & qualifying exams as per the respective course i.e. BTech, MTech, and MBA. After qualifying the minimum eligibility criteria, candidates will be selected for the course.
STEP 3: Document Verification & Payment of Admission Fee

Candidates shortlisted as per the course eligibility will have to submit the prescribedArya College of Engineering & Information Technology feesfor the particular course. Following this, candidates are required to go through the document verification and are informed about the date of commencement of the classes.

paragraphs: According to the latest report, the participating recruiters offered the highest package of INR 45 LPA and the average package of INR 6.19 LPA to the Class of 2024 . A total of 437 students were placed out of 535 registered students during BTech and MBA placements 2024 .

The College has a dedicated Training and Placement Cell that facilitates all types of placement-related activities. Arya College of Engineering and IT alumni are working in top companies such as Bennett Coleman and Co Ltd, Google and BMW . The College’s alumni are working in top profiles such as Team Lead, Vice President and Senior Manager .

hostel_campus.college_name: Arya College of Engineering and IT Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:
Separate Boys and Girls Hostels are available on the campus. Centrally Air Cooled, 2 and 3 Seater Rooms with attached Toilets are available.
The College has Hostel facility separately for boys and girls. Hostels have caring wardens, tight security, internet access, STD facilities, fully equipped common rooms, biometric readers, latest IP cameras, fire warning systems, and 24-hour guards.

library.description: Well Stocked Library with ample number of text/reference books and journals.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Table-Tennis, Billiards Table

reviews.review_heading: Supportive and well-qualified faculty, well-equipped campus, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure for the department are good. It has well-equipped laboratories, Wi-Fi connectivity, and smart classrooms. It also has a separate central library and an advanced library. The college provides separate hostel facilities and also encourages sports and extracurricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: The course curriculum is old, but it's a good college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent, classrooms are well managed, and a library is present with an advanced learning center in the college for group discussion on any project. The mess food is acceptable, but the night food is not as good as the day. Medical facilities and sports facilities are present with a proper sports playground for cricket, badminton, volleyball, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements, infrastructure, supportive facility but course needs updating.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and the infrastructure of the college are quite good. Wi-Fi is available (Bangon). Classrooms are well organized. Library is present, but timing for girls is 9:00 PM in the campus. The food quality of the mess is good. Sports ground, games, and medical facilities are present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: College is decent in terms of infrastructure, but it should improve in terms of placements.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure on our campus are quite good. Smart classrooms are quite good, but we don't have Wi-Fi in classrooms. However, we have Wi-Fi in the campus area. We have 2 libraries on campus, one of which is the advanced resource learning centre, in which student spend their time reading books and enhancing their skills. Hostels are well-maintained. The quality of food is good, but it becomes very tasteless at night. 24x7 medical facilities are available for students. We also have ...

reviews.review_heading: The placements are high, but not everyone gets placed.
reviews.review_text: There are 6 facilities available for teaching in the mechanical branch. There are four labs and 2 classrooms for the mechanical branch. The quality of the food is nice. There are three clubs for sports, culture, etc. Many facilities are available in every hostel. There are 12 hostels here.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is the worst here, please don't come.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is bad. Campus size is so small, and the crowd is fu*ed up, and the hostels are so bad. Mess food is totally ***, you can't even cook on your own, warden behaviour is so bad they treat you like *** after you get admission, please avoid this college.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college in some aspects, but not placement-wise.
reviews.review_text: In the last year, our college has been engaged in smart education, so smart classes, including smart boards and projectors, are provided. We have Wi-Fi facility, but in the classrooms we don't have it. We have two libraries in college, and they always have a rush during college time. We have good infrastructure and facilities in the college as well as in the hostel. The major problem is that at night, many of my friends and I do not have dinner in the college mess. Being a hosteller, at night, t...

reviews.review_heading: Decent placement opportunities with good packages.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent, and Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus, a library is present with an advanced learning resource center lab. The quality of the hostel is decent, and talking about the mess, the quality of food is good during the day, but not at night. Medical facilities and sports grounds are available in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Helpful faculty with mixed placement.
reviews.review_text: Talking about the infrastructure of the college, it is decent. Wi-Fi is available in the whole campus, and a library is present which is open around 12:00 AM. Classrooms are well designed, the mess food is good as compared to other colleges, but at night, the night mess food is not edible, sports grounds are present, and a canteen is present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall college is good if studies.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are good, and educated and computer lab, language lab, CAMD lab, skill lab, etc. are available. The quality of mess is not too good, and hostel Wi-Fi is available. You can play cricket and basketball; a court and gym are also available for all years students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure facilities but disappointing placement record.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent. Wi-Fi is available in the college, and a library is present in the college with all academic books, but the library hours at night are only 12, so this can be a bad thing if you are a night owl and want to study in the library. Mess and canteen are present. Mess has decent food, I will say better than other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: It is an enjoyable experience, but the curriculum could be better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is decent. The classrooms are clean and well-equipped, and Wi-Fi is available on the campus. The library has all academic books. Hostel life is very good. Once you come in, you will not feel like an outsider, no matter where you are from. Facilities like a gym and sports grounds for cricket, volleyball, and basketball are available.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include a football court, gym, cricket ground, basketball court, library, and many other things. 1st years students are not allowed to go outside of campus. For hostel students, only 1.5 months after that, it is allowed. Hostel food is average, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the placements in the previous two years.
reviews.review_text: Good Wi-Fi on campus. Labs are well organized with all the systems working properly and with good configuration. Now, each and every classroom is designed as a smart classroom, as professors use SMART boards to teach and illustrate with real-life examples of everything. The library is well managed, with almost 80,000 books currently available, our college offers good facilities when talking about the hostels, as they are pocket-friendly, and everybody enjoys the vibe and living in the hostel. Th...

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with the faculty, good infrastructure, and facilities with proper safety.
reviews.review_text: College's facilities and infrastructure are very good. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned and have proper ventilation. The college has full facilities for computer and other laboratories, and 24/7 Wi-Fi. There is a separate library with books, computers, and 24/7 access. The quality of the facilities is very good, the mess food is decent but very good in comparison to other PGs. There's a 24/7 facility for medical emergencies, and the campus is full of sports and games. The college also con...

highlights.summary:
MVJ College of Engineering admission 2026 are open. Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of the college.

college_info.intro:
MVJ College of Engineering provides various undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes. The courses include BTech in 15 branches, MTech in 7 branches, PhD in 8 branches, and MBA. The specialised areas at MVJ College include Chemical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Civil Engineering. The duration of these courses are between two to four years. faqs.answer: A:    The key highlights of MVJCE placements 2025 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2025)Total students815Students placed136Students opted for higher studies49
faqs.question: How are the placements at MVJ College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, the college has a placement cell. MVJCE's Placement Cell is supported by group discussion rooms, interview rooms, seminar halls, and more than 600 computers with 2 Gbps internet and LAN connectivity that can be utilized for online tests. The cell organises training programmes to improve personality development, confidence levels, analytical thought, presentation delivery, communication skills, basic & advanced aptitude skills and technical know-how.
faqs.question: Does MVJCE has a placement cell?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, MVJ College of Engineering offers placement and training cells. The cell works on the enhancement of student skills through group discussions, job interview training, and sessions in the seminar hall, with more than 600 computers and LAN connectivity that is helpful for online tests. The highest package and average package stood at INR 27.70 LPA and INR 5.60 LPA to INR 7 LPA.
faqs.question: Does MVJ college of Engineering offer any placement support?

faqs.answer: A:    MVJ College of Engineering offers decent placements annually for its BTech, MTech, and MBA courses. In 2023, the highest and average package offered during MVJ College of Engineering placements 2023 stood at INR 27.70 LPA and INR 7 LPA, respectively. The key highlights of MVJ College of Engineering placements for the Class of 2023 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2023)the highest packageINR 27.70 LPAAverage packageINR 5.60 LPA to INR 7 LPATop recruitersTCS, Cognizant, D
faqs.question: What is the placement record of MVJ College of Engineering?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: MVJ College of Engineering provides undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. These include- BTech, MBA, MTech, and PhD. The fees varies from different course and course levels. The total tuition fees ranges from INR 3.2 Lakh to INR 14.7 Lakh. This must be paid to confirm admission. Check more details below:-

faqs.answer: A:    MVJ College of Engineering provides a wide variety of specialisations in BTech. Candidates who wish to apply must meet the eligibility criteria as mentioned below:CourseEligibility/ SelectionSelection CriteriaBTechClass 12 with English, Math and Physics, along with Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology / Electronics / Computer Science with a minimum 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category).For Management Quota-  Class 12 with the above-mentioned subjects with a minimum 60% aggregate.BTech Lateral Entry- Diploma or equivalent from a recognized University with minimum 45% marks (40% for reserved category) in final year in relevant branch of Engineering.KCET/ COMEDK/ UGET/ AMPCK/ AIEEEInterview and Written test conducted by the University (under Management quota)
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for MVJ College of Engineering BTech?

faqs.answer: A:    Admission to all MVJ College of Engineering courses is entrance-based. Applicants selection is based on score in entrance exam. Eligible candidates can register online by visiting the official website of the institute. The following table mentions the eligibility, and selection criteria for all the courses:CourseEligibility CriteriaBTechClass 12 with English, Math and Physics, along with Chemistry / Biotechnology / Biology / Electronics / Computer Science with a minimum 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category).For Management Quota- Class 12 with the above-mentioned subjects with a minimum 60% aggregate.MTechGraduate or equivalent in respective specialisation with a minimum of 50% aggregate.MBAGraduation with a minimum 50% (Management quota 60%) aggregate, for the reserved category the minimum aggregate should be 45%.
faqs.question: How much percentage is required for MVJ College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can get admission to MVJ College of Engineering without appearing for JEE Main. MVJCE conducts Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET). Candidates who qualify for KCET and score well in the test are selected for admission followed by counselling. The minimum eligibility criteria includes passing Class 12. The main subjects in Class 12 include English, Physics and Maths along with Chemistry, Biology, Biotechnology, Electronics, or Computer Science.
faqs.question: Can I get admission at MVJ College of Engineering without JEE Main?

faqs.answer: A:     The MVJCE Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the MBA and M.Tech courses for multiple categories under both All India and Home State quota. The cutoff was published in the form of opening and closing ranks. For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 9660 in the first round to 27781 in the last round for the MBA programme. To know more information regarding cutoff details about other categories, rounds, courses and quotas, students can click here.
faqs.question: What is the MVJCE Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025?

reviews_list.review_title: A decent college and strict dress code.

review_content.Placements: Placement is decent, starting from the 7th semester, with an average package offered. Seniors, the highest offered is 21 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA. Placement training is provided by the college itself. Most students from last year got placed. Placement can be improved.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Minor improvements needed in the canteen and Wi-Fi connection. Medical support is available. Sports facilities are decent. Hostel and mess details are unknown. Separate lifts and washrooms are provided for staff and students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college with good placements, infrastructure, and teaching faculty members.

review_content.Placements: About 70%-80% of our college got placed. The highest package is 21 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, IBM, Accenture, and some product-based startups. Around 60% of students got internships in the above-mentioned companies and in-house campus programme offerings. Top roles offered are software and web developer, data analyst, and associate engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: College has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi availability in labs and library. Classrooms are projections and washrooms are cleaned regularly. The library is very big with good seating arrangements. Hostel rooms are average, and food quality is good. There is a playground and gym.

faqs.question: Q: How is MVJ College of Engineering for BTech Computer Science?

faqs.answer: Yes, MVJ College of Engineering offers a four-year full-time degree in B.E. at the undergraduate level. MVJ College of Engineering admission to B.E. is entrance-based. The institute offers B.E. in various specialisations including B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, B.E. Electronic and Communication Engineering, B.E. Indstrial IoT and others. Applicants looking for admission must visit the official website of the college to register themselves.
faqs.question: Q: Is B.E available at MVJ College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, the university offers BE courses to students. At the postgraduate level, the university offers MBA and M.Tech courses to students. Admission to all the courses is entrance based. Candidate seeking admission to any courses can apply and appear for the exam for admission.
faqs.question: Q: What are the courses offered at MVJ College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Yes, MVJ College of Engineering is considered as a good college. The college has been ranked by many ranking bodies. In 2024, Times ranked MVJ College 105th in the BE/BTech category. The college offers financial aid through scholarships and fee concessions. In 2023, Data Quest ranked MVJ College 84th among top private T-schools. overview_faqs.question: Is MVJ College of Engineering a good college/institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, MVJ College of Engineering is considered as a good college. The college has been ranked by many ranking bodies. In 2024, Times ranked MVJ College 105th in the BE/BTech category. The college offers financial aid through scholarships and fee concessions. In 2023, Data Quest ranked MVJ College 84th among top private T-schools. The MVJ campus has all modern amenities to the students including departmental clubs, library, cafe, gym, etc.

review_summary.college_name: MVJ College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: A satisfactory college experience for engineering students.

content.Placements: Placement in our college is quite good, especially for CSE students. This year, 50 students from our campus got placements in companies through on-campus recruitment. With the right training and preparation, students have a bright chance to get placed. That is why I give 4 out of 5 ratings to the placement.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructural support for my course is good. It has properly equipped classrooms and labs. Along with conducive learning atmosphere. Hostel facilities are also adequate with basic facilities and a comfortable living atmosphere. In essence, infrastructural support is very good for academics and living.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a decent college in Bangalore with good connectivity and a campus.

content.Placements: I am in my 2nd year right now and have not gone through placement drives. I do not have great clarity on placements, but as per the information provided and previous batches, the average package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA. More than 50 percent of students do internships in various top companies.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are like normal classrooms and nothing very fancy, but not bad either. Every classroom is equipped with a projector. Labs and the library have fast Wi-Fi. The library has over 40,000 books. Washrooms are decent but could be improved.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A decent college and strict dress code.

content.Placements: Placement is decent, starting from the 7th semester, with an average package offered. Seniors, the highest offered is 21 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA. Placement training is provided by the college itself. Most students from last year got placed. Placement can be improved.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Minor improvements needed in the canteen and Wi-Fi connection. Medical support is available. Sports facilities are decent. Hostel and mess details are unknown. Separate lifts and washrooms are provided for staff and students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Decent college with good placements, infrastructure, and teaching faculty members.

content.Placements: About 70%-80% of our college got placed. The highest package is 21 LPA and the lowest is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, IBM, Accenture, and some product-based startups. Around 60% of students got internships in the above-mentioned companies and in-house campus programme offerings. Top roles offered are software and web developer, data analyst, and associate engineer.
content.Infrastructure: College has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi availability in labs and library. Classrooms are projections and washrooms are cleaned regularly. The library is very big with good seating arrangements. Hostel rooms are average, and food quality is good. There is a playground and gym.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Comprehensive academic and career development at MVJCE.

content.Placements: MVJCE maintains a strong placement track record across core engineering, IT, and management domains. Over 80%-90% of eligible students are placed every year in reputed companies. Top recruiters in IT & Tech are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Capgemini, Accenture, IBM, HCL, Dell, and Tech Mahindra. Core companies like L&T, Bosch, Continental, Mercedes-Benz R&D, and NTT Data Startups. Mid-size companies like Zifo, Juspay, Unilog, and many others. The highest package can go up to 21 LPA, based on recent years, for select roles like data science/AI roles. The average package is around 4 LPA-6 LPA.

admission_process.title: MVJ College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: MVJ College of Engineering admissions 2025 is now open for the current academic year. The college offers courses under its School of Computer Science, Basic Science, School of Electrical Science, School of Mechanical Science, and School of Business. MVJ College is affiliated withVisvesvaraya Technological University. The College offers BE, MTech, and MBA and PhD courses among multiple specialisations.MVJ College of Engineeringoffers admission to BTech, MTech, and MBA is done through various national-level entrance exams such as KMAT/ CAT/ XAT/ MAT, etc. The application process is conducted in an online mode on the official website of the respective entrance exams. Read the below article to know more about MVJ College of Engineering admission process, course-wise eligibility and selection criteria:

The university offers various UG, PG and PhD courses in full-time mode. Candidates need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more on the key highlights of MVJ College of Engineering course admissions 2025 from the table presented below:
Particulars

MVJ College of Engineering offers entrance-based admission to all its courses. Admission to all UG, PG, and PhD courses is open. Candidates who meet the minimum eligibility criteria for the respective course will have to appear for the entrance exam for admission to all its courses. The table below listsMVJ College of Engineering courseseligibility criteria and selection process:
Eligibility Criteria
Selection Criteria
KCET/COMEDK/JEE
Graduate or equivalent in respective specialisation with a minimum of 50% aggregate

KMAT/PGCET/CMAT/XAT/MAT
BTech Lateral
Diploma or equivalent from a recognised university with 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)

MVJ College of Engineering admission process 2025is open. The college accepts various entrance exam scores, such as KCET, COMEDK, JEE, GATE, CMAT and others for admission to its courses. MVJ College of Engineering admission is a multi-step process. Check below for the step-by-stepMVJ College of Engineeringadmission process:
Step 1: MVJ College of Engineering Application Process 2025

The eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of MVJ College of Engineering. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed the entrance exam formalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the college.
Step 2: MVJ College of Engineering Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is entrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to all its courses. Further, the college offers admission to BTech via the Management quota.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for document verification. Selected candidates need to payMVJ College of Engineering course feeto confirm their admission.

faqs.answer: MVJ College of Engineering BE fee ranges between INR 3.9 – 14.7 lakh. Applicants have to pay the tuition fees for both years separately. Other than this, applicants also have to pay the non-refundable application fee.

faqs.question: Is B.E available at MVJ College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Yes,  MVJ College of Engineering offers a four-year full-time degree in B.E. at the undergraduate level.  MVJ College of Engineering admission to B.E. is entrance-based. The institute offers B.E. in various specialisations including B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, B.E. Electronic and Communication Engineering, B.E. Indstrial IoT and others. Applicants looking for admission must visit the official website of the college to register themselves.

The cut-off changes from year to year. General-category candidates applying for MBA admission through Karnataka-PGCET must aim at scoring a rank better than #7,000. Candidates seeking admission to the courses must have a 50% aggregate score in graduation along with the accepted entrance exam.

faqs.question: What are the criteria for MBA at MVJ College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: MVJ College of Engineering offers MBA within two years. Applicants seeking admission to MBA courses must have a graduation degree with 50% aggregate. Further, for the students belonging to the SC/ST category they required 45% aggregate. The admission to the MBA course is entrance-based. The college accepts various entrance exams including KMAT/PGCET/CMAT/XAT/MAT.

faqs.answer: A total of seven M.Tech specialisations are offered at MVJ College of Engineering. faqs.question: How can I get admission to M.Tech at MVJ College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: MVJ College of Engineering offers a full-time programme at the PG level. The college offers 126 seats in the M.Tech programme. Candidates seeking admission to  MTech can apply for the admission form online. To be eligible for admission to MTech, the candidates must have an aggregate of 50% in graduation. The college accepts GATE and PGCET for admission to M.Tech courses.

faqs.question: What are the criteria for M.Tech at MVJ College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: MVJ College of Engineering offers M.Tech with a duration of two years. Candidates seeking admission to M.Tech courses must have a graduation degree with 50% aggregate.The admission to the M.Tech course is entrance-based. The institute accepts various entrance exams including GATE and PGCET for admission.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at MVJ College of Engineering without JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can get admission to MVJ College of Engineering without appearing for JEE Main. MVJCE conducts Karnataka Common Entrance Test (KCET). Candidates who qualify for KCET and score well in the test are selected for admission followed by counselling. The minimum eligibility criteria includes passing Class 12. The main subjects in Class 12 include English, Physics and Maths along with Chemistry, Biology, Biotechnology, Electronics, or Computer Science.

faqs.question: What are the courses offered at MVJ College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: At the undergraduate level, the university offers BE courses to students. At the postgraduate level, the university offers MBA and M.Tech courses to students. Admission to all the courses is entrance based. Candidate seeking admission to any courses can apply and appear for the exam for admission.

paragraphs: The MVJCE placement process for 2025 is still in progress. As of now, 136 students have been placed, out of 815 students in total. Furthermore, 49 students opted for further education.

The Placement Cell at MVJCE facilitates interaction between the corporate world and the students for recruitment. More importantly, it is geared to understand corporate requirements and develop students who are employable. In the 4 years of the Engineering programme, this is accomplished through 250 additional hours of targeted training

faqs.question: What was the average package offered during MVJ College of Engineering BTech placements 2023?
faqs.answer: According to information on the official website, MVJCE strives to place 100% of all qualified students and has regularly met this goal over the years. Additionally, during MVJ College of Engineering placements during the past five years, more than 200 businesses have visited the campus. In addition to this, during placements at the MVJ College of Engineering, more than 750 offers are made annually. The median package provided at the MVJ College of Engineering BTech and M.Tech placements in 2022 was INR 4.5 LPA, according to the NIRF report for the college published in 2023. Additionally, the MVJ College of Engineering's BTech and M.Tech placements 2022 saw placement rates of 84% and 91%, respectively.
