library.description: A fully automated central library has a collection over 60,000 books and other documents. The Library subscribes to more than 60 national, international journals and more than 2000 e-Journals through the INDEST-AICTE Consortium – IEL. MVJCE also publishes an online MVJCE journal which covers the activities of R&D in engineering, science and technology management.

cafeteria.description: There is a hygienic, multi-cuisine vegetarian canteen for both resident students and day scholars. A leading café chain has set up its operations on campus to offer variety with coffees, sandwiches, pastries, etc.

hostel.description: The hostel offers supporting infrastructure includes a dedicated cafeteria, laundry services, an on-campus ATM, gym, 24-hour power supply, STD & ISD facilities, transport, housekeeping and medical care.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, 200 Meter Athletic Track, Volleyball Court, Handball Court, Throwball Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Language Lab, Mechanical Lab, Robotics and Automation Laboratory (RAL), Tinkering Lab, UAV Lab

reviews.review_heading: A satisfactory college experience for engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructural support for my course is good. It has properly equipped classrooms and labs. Along with conducive learning atmosphere. Hostel facilities are also adequate with basic facilities and a comfortable living atmosphere. In essence, infrastructural support is very good for academics and living.

reviews.review_heading: It is a decent college in Bangalore with good connectivity and a campus.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are like normal classrooms and nothing very fancy, but not bad either. Every classroom is equipped with a projector. Labs and the library have fast Wi-Fi. The library has over 40,000 books. Washrooms are decent but could be improved.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college and strict dress code.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, labs, and the library are good. Minor improvements needed in the canteen and Wi-Fi connection. Medical support is available. Sports facilities are decent. Hostel and mess details are unknown. Separate lifts and washrooms are provided for staff and students.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college with good placements, infrastructure, and teaching faculty members.
reviews.review_text: College has good infrastructure with Wi-Fi availability in labs and library. Classrooms are projections and washrooms are cleaned regularly. The library is very big with good seating arrangements. Hostel rooms are average, and food quality is good. There is a playground and gym.

reviews.review_heading: Comprehensive academic and career development at MVJCE.
reviews.review_text: MVJCE offers modern, well-equipped facilities that support quality engineering and management education. Engineering & technology facilities like smart classrooms equipped with projectors, audio-visual aids, and Wi-Fi. There are well-equipped labs, department-specific labs (CSE, ECE, mech, civil, etc.) AI/ML lab, IoT Lab, VLSI lab, data science lab, robotics lab, and programming labs with the latest systems and licensed software. The central library is equipped with more than 60,000 books, journ...

reviews.review_heading: No sports facility but very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is new and updated, and facilities are also very good. Wi-Fi is present in all plots of the college but not accessible. Labs are also highly equipped with updated equipment. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is very poor, and the quality of food available in mess is also not good. Zero sports and game facilities.

reviews.review_heading: College has an good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, and there are decent classrooms, labs, and hostel. I am not sure about the hostel thing because I am a day scholar. There are extra-curricular activities like sports, games, events and volunteers. We have many college clubs like dance, literally, singing, etc.

reviews.review_heading: I suggest students do not join this college if they want to become engineers.
reviews.review_text: It has the average infrastructure of labs and classrooms with no Wi-Fi. The hostel is too bad with no proper rooms and bad food. The canteen is a big setback with the worst food and no encouragement for sports and games. It has average medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: MVJCE is the best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: MVJ College of Engineering offers comprehensive facilities to support both academic and extracurricular activities. There are modern classrooms, advanced labs, Wi-Fi, and more than 50,000 books in a 17,000 sq. Ft. library. There is a separate hostel for boys and girls. We have shared rooms, a cafeteria, gym, ATM, laundry, and medical care. Nutritious meals are there in the mess and canteen. Indoor and outdoor courts include tennis, badminton, and basketball. There is a gym with trainers. On-camp...

reviews.review_heading: College is good. I would recommend this college to others.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi labs are good, with good infrastructure and spacious classrooms with projectors. The food in the canteen is average. College has gym, medical center, playground, and basketball ground. Auditorium and parking lots are spacious with very good security.

reviews.review_heading: MVJ College of Engineering Bangalore
reviews.review_text: MVJ College of Engineering provides good facilities like modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, a library with many books and e-resources, and campus-wide Wi-Fi. Hostels are clean and offer basic amenities. The mess serves decent food, and the canteen has snacks and beverages. Medical care is available on campus, and there are facilities for sports like cricket, football, and indoor games. The overall infrastructure supports learning and student activities.

reviews.review_heading: MVJCE has good placements and well qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are very good. We enjoy a lot on campus. Facilities are very good they help all students to get job opportunities. Hostel rooms are good. The mess food is very good and delicious. But only vegetarian food is available in mess.

reviews.review_heading: Decent & Bit Flawed College.
reviews.review_text: The facilities offered in MVJCE are good. They have Wi-Fi accessibility, good laboratories, and spacious classrooms (although a few classes look dark and suffocating). It has a good library with various collections of books from numerous authors. I'm a day scholar, so I don't know how the hostel operates. But I heard that it's average. Rooms are pretty decent, but the food is strictly average, and only vegetarian food is available! It has enough sports amenities and many sports events, but baske...

reviews.review_heading: Review of M.V.J. College of Engineering
reviews.review_text: Our college recently introduced state-of-the-art lab facilities. There are special labs like NI LabView, Microsoft, VLSI, Robolab, and advanced communication. These are the highlights. There are 2 boys' hostels and one girls' hostel. They are decent.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing college with great infrastructure
reviews.review_text: MVJ College of Engineering has a pretty good infrastructure. They have spacious classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a good library. The campus is big and has facilities for sports and other activities. There's a canteen and a medical center too. Overall, it's a decent place to study.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh. Placement is average. Infrastructure is good.

content.Placements: Around 30% of students were placed. The top companies are local from Chhattisgarh. Top roles are like BDA sales, etc. Average package is around 3 -4 LPA in our college. Maximum students got no placement; only a few got placement here . And the job roles are sales and business-related, so maximum students do not accept offers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good. A classroom library is also good. Talking about a hostel for boys is not good. Food is also not good here. But new girl hostels are constructed here for girls, which is better than the boys hostel Over all college is good if you want to do engineering on a low budget.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Why shouldn't you take admission to this institute!

content.Placements: Placement is not available but the highest package offered is 12 LPA and average package is 4 LPA, but most of the marketing companies are doing placements. According to me last year, all the companies were marketing-based, like Byju's, HDFC, Learning Growth, etc. There are no criteria for placement.
content.Infrastructure: The college has only 3 blocks: the first for engineering students, the second for pharmacy students, and the third EMCE block. The college area is decent. In the lab, there are some computers that don't work properly. Even when you are in the classroom, the internet is not working properly.

admission_process.title: Chouksey Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Chouksey Engineering College admissionsare completely based on entrance-exam scores. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Chouksey Engineering College is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Chouksey Engineering College Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website, https://cecbilaspur.ac.in/admissions/#. Candidates can fill out the application form on the college's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute admits students based on entrance exam scores. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theChouksey Engineering College feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

Chouksey Engineering College concluded the placements for the Class of 2025. As per the latest report, the highest and average packages offered during Chouksey Engineering College placements in 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 5 LPA , respectively. The top recruiters of Chouksey Engineering College in 2025 included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Cognizant, Amazon, HTC, Intellipaat, ICICI Bank, Patanjali, Bosch, LIC, Airtel, LG, Godrej, etc.

The Institute provides 1 library facility with capacity of 33994 books and 78 journals

hostel.description: The Institute has 3 hostal facility with capacity of 209 students

reviews.review_heading: Good college in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh. Placement is average. Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is good. A classroom library is also good. Talking about a hostel for boys is not good. Food is also not good here. 
But new girl hostels are constructed here for girls, which is better than the boys hostel 
Over all college is good if you want to do engineering on a low budget.

reviews.review_heading: Why shouldn't you take admission to this institute!
reviews.review_text:
The college has only 3 blocks: the first for engineering students, the second for pharmacy students, and the third EMCE block. 
The college area is decent. In the lab, there are some computers that don't work properly. Even when you are in the classroom, the internet is not working properly.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very nice. Meals are average or okay, but here you can make friends who are more than friends, like your family for you during your course. Some basic facilities are available, like single-bed study areas, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Transformative college experience : Academic excellence and personal growth.
reviews.review_text: The amenities and resources provided for my program consist of dependable internet access, fully equipped laboratories, standard classrooms, and a well-stocked library. The hostel's facilities are also comprehensive. The college canteen offers a variety of quality food options. Additionally, there are sports activities available, such as badminton and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Very dissatisfied with the college. There are no clubs. No sports equipment & not a big campus.
reviews.review_text: Not very good infrastructure. The labs are very compact and there is no Wi-Fi available for students to use while in the campus. It has a very small ground. Canteen also has very limited food items. They advertise a lot of items but they offer all those.

reviews.review_heading: Chouksey Engineering College is not so good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of main building is good. EEE/ME/CE building is also good from the outside, but branches are like government schools. Our library is excellent. Wi-Fi is available. You can't study books in a library. You have to keep your book to study, which means you just go there and study your own book. You can only study in a library when there are no classes. Hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: Chouksey Engineering College Review.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully Wi-Fi-enabled, and the library offers e-books. There are digital classrooms, hostel facilities, a canteen, a mess, and sports facilities. Extracurricular activities like NSS, NCC, RSS, and RRC are available. Everything is going well, and our campus is equipped with a digital library and all necessary labs, including mechanical and civil labs.

reviews.review_heading: Chouksey Engineering College review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average but satisfactory. As per fees, the college maintains decent infrastructure, which you can expect from a state private engineering college. It has a good playground area with space to play cricket, badminton, and volleyball, along with a lush green garden to spend your breaks.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied because of the good faculty.

review_content.Placements: Campus placements are completely different from off-campus placements. I have seen a person who started preparing just a week before the placements, get into a very good company. The best part about campus placements is that they give an opportunity to each and every student.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are generally good to excellent, with modern facilities like Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, libraries, and recreational spaces. Hostels often offer well-ventilated and furnished rooms, sometimes with apartment-style layouts, and include amenities like dining halls.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, my college is best for students who can't afford a high-level university.

review_content.Placements: Only 10 to 20% of students got placements from last year. The highest package in my college is 24 LPA. Most often, recruiting companies are Cognizant, TCS, Omneky, DeltaX, etc. The college also provides summer internships to all students through Rooman Technologies. The top roles offered in my course are software developer roles. So, after all this, my college is a tier-3 college, so we can't expect much more from it.
review_content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is good. They provide Wi-Fi in labs and SLCs. Labs are also not bad. Classrooms are very nice, and they have recently renovated all classrooms. The hostel is not for boys. Hostel facility is only available for girls. The canteen is separate for boys and girls, and it has also been renovated recently.

overview_faqs.question: Is G Pullaiah College of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: G Pullaiah College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, G Pullaiah College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.75 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.63 on Campus Life, 3.6 on Placements, 3.95 on Faculty and 3.74 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: G Pullaiah College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: At the end of college, every student loves and miss the college very much.

content.Placements: Recently, we attend CTS, which is Cognizant, and our college expects a good number of students to get selected in that company. The college helps students a lot to crack jobs in the company. Getting jobs is beneficial for both the college and students.
content.Infrastructure: Our college contains only three blocks and is a small college group. So the infrastructure of the college is not that good, but the systems in the college are better for seniors. Recently, the infrastructure of the college has changed a lot. The college management works on it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence ) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely, it will be regret.

content.Placements: 40 percent getting placed, placements are very rare. The number of companies conducting drives is only 3. There will be fewer students getting places in our college. Lack of facilities and skills is leading to students not getting placed. It is very hard to get.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are not good, and lab systems are not working well. There will be a lot of network issues, which usually interrupt students.
content.Faculty: The exam is conducted very strictly. Teachers are not well-experienced, and they don't have knowledge of their subject itself. They present PPTs. Through PPT's information, how can a student acquire knowledge. This includes a lack of skills, which disturbs the concentration.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied because of the good faculty.

content.Placements: Campus placements are completely different from off-campus placements. I have seen a person who started preparing just a week before the placements, get into a very good company. The best part about campus placements is that they give an opportunity to each and every student.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are generally good to excellent, with modern facilities like Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, libraries, and recreational spaces. Hostels often offer well-ventilated and furnished rooms, sometimes with apartment-style layouts, and include amenities like dining halls.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, my college is best for students who can't afford a high-level university.

content.Placements: Only 10 to 20% of students got placements from last year. The highest package in my college is 24 LPA. Most often, recruiting companies are Cognizant, TCS, Omneky, DeltaX, etc. The college also provides summer internships to all students through Rooman Technologies. The top roles offered in my course are software developer roles. So, after all this, my college is a tier-3 college, so we can't expect much more from it.
content.Infrastructure: Overall infrastructure is good. They provide Wi-Fi in labs and SLCs. Labs are also not bad. Classrooms are very nice, and they have recently renovated all classrooms. The hostel is not for boys. Hostel facility is only available for girls. The canteen is separate for boys and girls, and it has also been renovated recently.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is very good.

content.Placements: Placement is very good. Most reputed companies come to our college for placements, and many students get selected. Faculty members are helpful during the placement. Most of our seniors get placed in companies. There is special training for placement in our college.
content.Infrastructure: The college hostel infrastructure is very nice, but there is only one issue. There is no hostel for boys. The hostel is only for girls, but it is very safe and secure. The infrastructure of the hostels and college is good, and the college canteen is also very good and reasonable. There is space for sports, and the ground is very big.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from several streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and MCA. VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology fee structure ranges between INR 1,16,940 to 10,45,908.

faqs.answer: A:    VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology are Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: In our college, the placement department is very dedicated. Almost 85% of students in our batch got placed. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA. The top recruiting company is SAP. The college offered tech-related jobs like software development, testing, and other related roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has a good environment where we connect to the college spiritually. Wi-Fi and lab facilities are available. There are different canteens for different branches.
review_content.Faculty: Teaching wise the college has the best teachers. They give us clear-cut exposure to all concepts. Semester-wise exams get a bit heavier since engineering has a lot of the syllabus. Teachers here not only concentrate on the syllabus, but they also make sure that we learn aspects from the outside world.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Professors and facilities were best in our class.

review_content.Placements: Our college is a good choice for MBA. In our course, 50% of students get placed in our college. The highest offered package was 13 LPA, and the lowest offered package was 4 LPA. The average offered package was between 4-9 LPA. Top roles offered were in human resources, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, labs, hostels, a canteen, and a sports complex to the students. The college has a well-stocked library. The hostel facilities include furnished and cleaned rooms, along with good quality food.

overview_faqs.question: Is VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 3.74 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.6 on Campus Life, 3.53 on Placements, 4.05 on Faculty and 3.81 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: VCET - Vivekananda College of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Strong academics and placements with a fun, engaging campus life.

content.Placements: Batch & Course Details: B.Teach in computer science and engineering (Batch of 2021-2025). The placement percentage - 87% of students were placed through campus recruitment. The highest Package is 10 LPA, the lowest package is 3.5 LPA, and the average package is 6.8 LPA. The top recruiting company is Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good food and good facilities. The classrooms were clean and Wi-Fi enabled, with well-equipped labs and access to a good library. Hostel rooms were decent and regularly maintained. Mess food was average but hygienic. Sports facilities and basic medical care were available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College gives many facilities and there are good and friendly faculty members.

content.Placements: Overall, in engineering, around 85% of students were placed in many companies. 12 LPA was the highest package and 5 LPA was the lowest package offered for our course. Companies like SAP, DeltaX, UniCourt, SignDesk, Streebo, LinkEZ, Winman, OPSEC, etc., were the top recruiting companies. Top roles like SWE will be offered.
content.Infrastructure: College provides a bandwidth of 500 Mbps Wi-Fi connection, well-equipped laboratories, classrooms and a well-organized library. They give information about scholarships. Transport facilities are given; it has a good source of power supply. Hostel food can be adjustable. The college campus has its own canteen. There are good achievements in sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: In our college, the placement department is very dedicated. Almost 85% of students in our batch got placed. The highest salary package offered is 15 LPA. The top recruiting company is SAP. The college offered tech-related jobs like software development, testing, and other related roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has a good environment where we connect to the college spiritually. Wi-Fi and lab facilities are available. There are different canteens for different branches.
content.Faculty: Teaching wise the college has the best teachers. They give us clear-cut exposure to all concepts. Semester-wise exams get a bit heavier since engineering has a lot of the syllabus. Teachers here not only concentrate on the syllabus, but they also make sure that we learn aspects from the outside world.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Professors and facilities were best in our class.

content.Placements: Our college is a good choice for MBA. In our course, 50% of students get placed in our college. The highest offered package was 13 LPA, and the lowest offered package was 4 LPA. The average offered package was between 4-9 LPA. Top roles offered were in human resources, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, labs, hostels, a canteen, and a sports complex to the students. The college has a well-stocked library. The hostel facilities include furnished and cleaned rooms, along with good quality food.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Overall, a college with all facilities.

content.Placements: Our college provides excellent placement opportunities for MBA graduates. Almost 70% of students secure placements. The average offered package for MBA was 4-8 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Deloitte, Infosys, etc. Top roles offered were in HR, associate, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities at our college were of good quality. The infrastructure of the college was amazing. College classrooms and labs were spacious and well-equipped. The library of the college had all types of books. The facilities of the hostel include furnished rooms and good-quality mess food.

reviews.review_text: The college has good food and good facilities. The classrooms were clean and Wi-Fi enabled, with well-equipped labs and access to a good library. reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. It has a good environment where we connect to the college spiritually. Wi-Fi and lab facilities are available. There are different canteens for different branches.

reviews.review_heading: Professors and facilities were best in our class.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi, a library, labs, hostels, a canteen, and a sports complex to the students. The college has a well-stocked library. The hostel facilities include furnished and cleaned rooms, along with good quality food.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a college with all facilities.
reviews.review_text: Facilities at our college were of good quality. The infrastructure of the college was amazing. College classrooms and labs were spacious and well-equipped. The library of the college had all types of books. The facilities of the hostel include furnished rooms and good-quality mess food.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with campus placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are average. The Wi-Fi is kind of unusable. Labs are good and contain all the necessary equipment. Classrooms are not well maintained. The projectors are not good, and no one even cares to align them properly. The library is good and contains all sorts of books for reference. There are no medical facilities in the college, and the mess is not good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college and I would recommend joining it.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good with a healthy environment. The college campus is lush green, and the canteen is also good. There are 2 good libraries, well-equipped labs, clean and hygienic washrooms and restrooms for girls to take rest. Classrooms are good with good seating arrangements.

reviews.review_heading: I am very much satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: We have many facilities like laboratories for all the department, and a large library with all kinds of books, including books for preparatory exams like GATE, TNPSC, and all group exams. We have smart classroom facilities. Our hostel is very hygienic and safe for all the girls. We have a canteen facility too.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent college for women which ensures 100% safety and quality education.
reviews.review_text: Whatever students want to do in college life is available inside the campus, including driving class. We need not go outside of the campus for learning and purchasing. Even if we want to meet our parents, we can use our special bus facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to study engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are clean and beautiful classrooms and laboratories with all facilities which are required to study. The entire campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Even hostels are provided with Wi-Fi facility for students. Our college has a well-defined infrastructure with clean and beautiful greenery. There is a good playground.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement record in 2019.
reviews.review_text: Facilities for course was good. Hostel is good with facilities like study hall and phone locker and seperate mess with descent food.

reviews.review_heading: Good facilities and infrastructure. 80% of students got placed.
reviews.review_text: They provide good facilities and infrastructure in our college like Wi-Fi, labs, classroom, library, canteen. In hostel food provided is good and even canteen, medicine, sports activities are good. Even during sports meet they provide good facilities.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges in Dakshina Kannada.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is great in 3 buildings. The classrooms are spacious and enabled for digital teaching as well. The library is great place to read and the book bank facility is highly appreciated. The labs are well-equipped. There are more than 3 labs for the department. The hostel food has to be slightly compromised. The canteen can still do better. Sports & games are encouraged wisely.

reviews.review_heading: Useful review of vcet puttur.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough both in college and hostel. College has a vast ground. College is well equipped with good labs and electrical equipments. Food was good. Food was provided for 4 times a day. The entire campus provides only vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available for the laptops of the students in the college premises. Laboratories are provided with the required infrastructure. Every classroom is provided with a projector. The library is made up of two sections that are a large reference section and lending section.

review_summary.college_name: Shah and Anchor Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Cyber Security Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good placement but avg campus size.

content.Placements: Around 60% of students are placed. TCS, Infosys and Wipro are top recruiting companies. The highest CTC is 16 LPA and avg is 4.37 LPA. 82% of students got internship on and off campus. The placements have significantly improved after the college gained autonomy.
content.Infrastructure: The college is not very big but its sufficient enough. It has a big library, gym and ground. The canteen food is not very good but there are places just outside the college where you can eat. Medical facilities are top notch and we also have psychiatrist in the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Real student perspective on SAKEC.

content.Placements: Shah & Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College offers strong placement and internship support. In the 2024-25 placement season, 105 companies visited the campus including Accenture TCS Capgemini and more. The average is 4.6 LPA with 71 offers above 5 LPA. A major highlight was a student getting placed at Flipkart with a 32 LPA package. The training and placement cell is active and conducts aptitude prep and workshops to make students industry ready.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent. Labs and the library are air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms don't have AC, which can be a downside during hot days. The college supports indoor sports with facilities like a gym, table tennis, and carrom. Sports are also encouraged during college tests, making the atmosphere more engaging for students. The canteen is a bit small, and the food is okay, but manageable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering ( VLSI Design and Technology) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Overall, the college is great.

content.Placements: My batch in VLSI has recently started at this college, and the teaching staff is really helpful in this particular field. Placements are guaranteed. Since it is a recent field, there are currently no students with internships yet, as there are only 3 batches, ranging from 1st, 2nd, and 3rd year.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is up to date and modern, with great Wi-Fi and classroom services. The labs are equipped with modern technology, and the library is available in both offline and online modes. Medical facilities in the college are well-equipped, with appropriate medicine and first aid. This college also has a sports club which plays at the inter-college and national levels.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Unfiltered experience at Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College.

content.Placements: Almost 60% of the students in our college get placed. 80% of the Computer Science department gets internships. The highest package is around 22 LPA, and the average package is around 4.5 LPA. The top companies are Capgemini and TCS. Computer Science and IT have better placement rates compared to Electronics and other lower branches. Still, the college provides good internship opportunities
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent. There are gym and medical facilities available in the college. The labs have AC, and ventilation is there in classrooms. The library is open from 9 AM to 7 PM. The college doesn't have its own hostel, most students take PG around the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Mahavir Education Trust's Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College (SAKEC).

content.Placements: They always say that there are 100% of placements but this is never the case. Many students are still not placed due to less CGPA or due to previous KTs which I feel do not exactly determine the knowledge of the person. What I like is there is a dedicated placement cell, so students can approach to seek placements and hiring.
content.Infrastructure: It has a decent infrastructure. A new building is being built which would increase the campus size by a reasonable amount. Also, the current building is not up to the standards as it is kind of old now. It has a lot of pillars and walls, which have lost their colors. Basic facilities are available.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

faqs.question: How can I get admission in Mahavir Education Trust's Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College?
faqs.answer: To get admission to Mahavir Education Trust and Anchor Engineering College candidates completed their 10 + 2 education with 45 percentage of marks. Students must complete physics; chemistry and mathematics. For the candidates from reservation categories, the minimum percentage of marks is 40. Admissions are based on scores of JEE main or common entrance tests. Candidates who qualify for the JEE main don't need to write a common entrance test. To get admission fill out the form available online or at the college office with the cost of INR 600.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by Mahavir Education Trust's Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College for admission MBA?
faqs.answer: The MBA program at Mahavir Education Trust's Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College (SAKEC) has been discontinued, that means you cannot get admission to this course. B.Tech and M.Tech courses are still offered at SAKEC across various specialisations. The institute strives to provide quality education to students at an affordable fee to make it accessible for meritorious students.

faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to Mahavir Education Trust's Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College?
faqs.answer: To get admission to Mahavir Education Trust Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College candidates must submit documents. Two copies of passport-size photos. Original and Xerox copies of JEE main rank card. Original and Xerox copies of the common entrance test rank card. Original and Xerox copies of the 10th and 12th marksheet. Identity proof like an Aadhaar card or passport. Candidates who apply from the Maharashtra state quota must require a domicile certificate. If a candidate applying for any scholarships are fee concessions Income Tax certificate required.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty and good placement but avg campus size.
reviews.review_text: The college is not very big but its sufficient enough. It has a big library, gym and ground. The canteen food is not very good but there are places just outside the college where you can eat. Medical facilities are top notch and we also have psychiatrist in the campus.

reviews.review_heading: Real student perspective on SAKEC.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is decent. Labs and the library are air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. Classrooms don't have AC, which can be a downside during hot days. The college supports indoor sports with facilities like a gym, table tennis, and carrom. Sports are also encouraged during college tests, making the atmosphere more engaging for students. The canteen is a bit small, and the food is okay, but manageable.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is great.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is up to date and modern, with great Wi-Fi and classroom services. The labs are equipped with modern technology, and the library is available in both offline and online modes. Medical facilities in the college are well-equipped, with appropriate medicine and first aid. This college also has a sports club which plays at the inter-college and national levels.

reviews.review_heading: Unfiltered experience at Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite decent. There are gym and medical facilities available in the college. The labs have AC, and ventilation is there in classrooms. The library is open from 9 AM to 7 PM. The college doesn't have its own hostel, most students take PG around the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahavir Education Trust's Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College (SAKEC).
reviews.review_text: It has a decent infrastructure. A new building is being built which would increase the campus size by a reasonable amount. Also, the current building is not up to the standards as it is kind of old now. It has a lot of pillars and walls, which have lost their colors. Basic facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Sake has been an exciting rollercoaster ride so far
reviews.review_text: Sake does not have any hostels, so you need to find a PG, hostel, or any rented place nearby the college by yourself. Talking about the infrastructure of the college, it's pretty good. Even though there is not much campus life, the ambiance is clean and technologically equipped. The campus has a full-on Mumbai vibe, even though it is small and the number of people admitted is quite large

reviews.review_heading: Okayish education, small campus, average placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Sake College has nice classrooms with 50 well-equipped labs, a nice library, and high-speed Wi-Fi. I'm not in the hostel, so I can't say anything about the food or service there. The campus does have a medical center, an equipped gym, and facilities for indoor games like TT, chess, and carrom.

reviews.review_heading: Good and helpful faculty. Really good canteen facility.
reviews.review_text: Our college has no hostel facilities available on the college premises, but the college faculty recommends nearby hostel and paying guest facilities. Wi-Fi is available in every lab for students. Labs are fully air-conditioned. The library is also very good.

reviews.review_heading: The teachers and environment are very productive, while the placements were not that good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of my college improved with time and are above average. However, there was no hostel facility, and there was not much ground for playing or extracurricular activities. Still, the infrastructure, Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library were excellent. The security systems installed were excellent, and the environment is ragging-free. It is safe, continuously monitored by authorities. For my course, even the technical infrastructure, such as computers and the network...

reviews.review_heading: Overall decent college.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities provided by the college. Every department has its own labs. The library is air-conditioned, where you can sit and study peacefully, and there is a good variety of books. There is a canteen, and the food quality is quite good and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: Shah and anchors review as engineering student.
reviews.review_text: Best quality equipment, like PCs and computers, and furniture are provided in fully air-conditioned labs. Each floor has spacious washrooms that are cleaned twice a day to maintain hygiene. The Gymkhana includes games like carrom, chess, and table tennis, as well as a very good and less crowded gym with a trainer.

reviews.review_heading: Really satisfied which such a NAAC A grade college with well maintained infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Well-maintained infrastructure although the college doesn't have its own private grounds, which makes the campus short, the labs and equipments are well maintained and up-to-date. The washrooms are available on each floor, which are cleaned twice a day, making it comfortable for students to use the air-conditioned library, which is filled with various books.

reviews.review_heading: Underrated college because of the campus, but has good academics and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college does not have a library. The infrastructure includes a 7 floored huge building along with a library, gym, indoor sports room, canteen, etc. Wi-Fi is available in the college but too many students use it which is why only LAN works properly. Quality of food in the canteen is average.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SAKEC by a student.
reviews.review_text: The technical festival is Avishkar, and the cultural festival is Pratishtha. There are many types of books available in the library and it is an air-conditioned library. There are all type of sports activities done in the college Actually, I don't have much idea about what role the company offered students in the internship; mostly they were juniors, I guess but I think the intensive opportunities were good student packages after the placement; the average package was also around 8 lacs, and the...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shah and Anchor Kutchhi Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities like a Wi-Fi library, we can use computer systems provided in the library, there is a canteen and stationery is also built into the infrastructure. They have also provided medical emergency kits and there is a special gym area.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: I'm dissatisfied with the college due to the campus and placement being average, but overall good.

review_content.Placements: Nearly 90 % placed. The highest was 14 Lakhs, and the lowest was 3.8 Lakhs. SAP, Labs, and B.M.C. were top companies. 60% got internships, and the roles offered were software development, quality assurance, etc. Also, many of them are placed in mass recruiters like Cognizant.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is small and lacks a playground, but the classes and labs are good, with each lab having an average capacity of around 40 PCs. The hostel is also small and compact, available only for first-year students. Additionally, the classrooms are small, resembling those of a school, and the benches are quite small as well.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Telecommunication Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I'm satisfied with the college because of the teaching, but not with the campus and college life.

review_content.Placements: More than half of the class will be placed. The average annual package of this college is 4-5 Lacs per annum. The college will take care of preparation for aptitude and interview grounds for students. Also, the college will provide previous years' interview questions. They will arrange practice sessions for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and the overall college are very neat and clean. Daily cleaning is done by the cleaning staff. The hostel facility of the college is only provided on a first-come, first-serve basis. The college also has lifts. Wi-Fi is available, but only for lab computers, not for personal use.

individual_reviews.title: Good college if you want to study.

content.Placements: So last year, there were around 300 students in my branch. Half of them were placed. Many of the other half went abroad for higher studies, and many studied for GATE. Overall, the placement is good with good companies. Many of them are placed in good companies.

These programmes are offered in the fields of Engineering, Applied Sciences, IT, Business Management, and Computer Applications. The application process can be completed both online and offline. Also known as PCCOE&R, the college is an integral part of PCET. faqs.question: Who is eligible for Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research?

faqs.answer: You may get into Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research without appearing for the entrance exam, given that you apply only for the courses to which admission is merit-based. However, for admission to the engineering course, students must have appeared for the accepted entrance test (JEE Mains/ MHCET).
faqs.question: Can I get into Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research without entrance exam?

faqs.answer: No, Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research admissions aren't entirely entrance-based. Students seeking to join the B.E course need to provide valid scores obtained in either MHTCET or JEE Mains. Similarly, for BBA and BCA, admissions are done based on MAH CET BBA and MAH CET BCA respectively. For detailed admission procedure and eligibility criteria, students can connect with the admission desk of the college.
faqs.question: Are Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research admissions merit-based?

faqs.answer: Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research offers a large diversity of courses to students in various fields. PCCOE Ravet admissions are held on the basis of entrance tests. Students seeking course admissions must clear their previous qualifying examination and appear for any of the prescribed entrance exams such as MHT CET, JEE Main, among others. Students can visit the official website to learn more regarding the course-wise eligibility and specialisation details.
faqs.question: How do I get a seat at Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research?

admission_process.title: Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research's admission processincludes several steps such as application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students can join the college must first appear for the entrance exam. Once the exam results are out, students need to report to the college campus for document verification, post which a seat will be allocated. The process is mainly completed offline. Below-mentioned are the step-by-stepPimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research admission procedure:
Application & Registration

Contenders can visit the website of the college to learn more about the application process for the desired programme. Studenst need to apply for the accepted test and keep the copy of their scorecard. Once the results are out, students can report at the college campus with the relevant documents for verification.
Selection Process

Students are shortlisted mainly based on entrance exam scores. Students need to either appear for state-level tests or provide valid scores secured in national-level exams accepted by the college. The college accepts MHCET scores for all of its courses. Additionally, fulfilling the basic eligibility is also required.
Admission Confirmation

For final seat confirmation, students need to report to the college along with the required documents. Once the documents are verified, students need to pay thePimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research feesfor seat confirmation.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my admission at Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your admission at Pimpri Chinchwad College of Engineering and Research. The college follows the norms of DTE Maharashtra for admission cancellation. Students can cancell their candidature by either opting to not submit the required documents which will automatically annul the application. There is another alternate, the students can also submit Proforma O for cancelling their application.

description: PCCOE Ravet cutoff 2025 is finally out for aspirants seeking admission to the BTech and Integrated BTech courses. The JoSAA Round 1 seat allotment result 2025 has been released as opening and closing ranks across different categories belonging to the AI and HS quotas. Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the PCCOE Ravet JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:
NTA has released the JEE Main Result 2024 for Session 2. Candidates can download their scorecard from the NTA website jeemain.nta.ac.in.
The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

PCCOE Ravet cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 52905 and 147710 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 52905, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 52264.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 52905.

reviews.review_heading: My actual experience at PCCOER.
reviews.review_text: The ground of the college is very small. You cannot expect anything from sports. The quality of the food in the mess is also very bad but you can find many other options in Akurdi. Our college is just a straight building so there is no social life. There is a library to study but it closes at 5 PM.

reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are very useful. The college does not have a playground, so sports are not played in the college. The canteen and food of the college are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is actually a good college for learning and placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are all actually very good in our college. Labs with proper'PCs and LAN connections. Classrooms are also well arranged. The library is also very good. The hostel is also good; they provide all facilities. Actually, I'm not a hostel student.

reviews.review_heading: A+ accreditation by NAAC, excellent teachers, good placements,average infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, with adequate labs, classrooms, and a library. The mess and canteen quality is average. Hostel facilities are not available on campus, but there is a hostel located a bit away from the college. Sports, games, and gym facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Pretty much satisfied. Placement is decent, though you have to compromise with the college campus.
reviews.review_text: On the whole campus, WiFi is available, labs are available, classrooms are available, of course and a library is available, but the hostel is a little bit far from campus, the college cafe is good, the canteen's food is ok, and sports and other medical facilities are usual.

reviews.review_heading:
PCCOER College Review 
Really Good Infrastructure and Facilities, Small Campus, Good Quality Labs
reviews.review_text: Facilities available for E&TC Course are:- Wi-Fi access to all the students who want to pursue extra certification courses, Study, Work part time, etc. Good quality Labs are provided to encourage students in handling actual tools. Workshops are arranged from which students learn works like Drilling Welding, Cutting of Metal sheets etc. Two libraries which consist various books related to different courses, MPSC, UPSC, Personality Development, Communication Skills, Networks, Circuits, etc. Mess f...

reviews.review_heading: I'm very satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The college also provides many types of clubs, from coding to music , dance and everything. They also provide counselors for students every week. They are also building a new floor for the department now for the new classroom. We also have big parking spaces at college.

reviews.review_heading: A good college for placements .
reviews.review_text: A library is made available with different skills-building and technical knowledge books, along with a separate reading room for students. As for hostel accommodation, it is primarily allotted for first-year students and mess with different food menus everyday .

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is not good. The campus is small. Our college does not have a sports ground. The hostel is not up to the mark. Our college has very good surroundings.

reviews.review_heading: College is accredited by A+ by NBA in 2023 in its 1st cycle. You should definitely take admission.
reviews.review_text: The college campus will not attract you anymore but the teaching staff, teaching methodology, placements will. The mess and canteen facility is very good and having classrooms with internet connected and projectors helps students to learn faster. You will be provided proper guidance from the faculty as everyone of them have a specialized skills in their respective subjects.

highlights.summary:
The CUET UG 2026 registration portal is now closed for MIET Meerut admission to several UG courses. The CUET exam 2026 will be conducted from May 11 to May 31, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
Meerut Institute of Engineering & Technology comprises more than 15 departments, including Information Technology, Management Studies, Chemical Engineering, Biotechnology, Pharmacy, and others. The institute offers UG and PG courses across various streams. MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the institute.
MIET Meerut offers full-time, four-year BTech programmes at the UG level. The BTech programmes offered at the university cover core courses in the areas of CSE, Biotechnology, Electronics & Communication, Civil, Information Technology, Chemical, Electrical, and others. Below mentioned are the Meerut Institute of Engineering & Technology popular programmes:

student_insights.feedback: Offered every semester
Higher in core jobs
Both inside India & outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology offers 28 courses, including undergraduate and postgraduate programmes. The duration of BTech and BPharma is four years each. Other UG courses like BSc and BVoc are of three-year duration. At the PG level, the institute offers MBA, MSc, MPharma, MTech, MSc, and other courses offered to the students. BPharma is a two-year programme. The table below lists the popular MIET courses along with their specialisations and MIET Meerut fee details:

faqs.answer: A:    The total fees for MIET Meerut BSc biotechnology is around INR 76, 260. The total fee includes INR 5000 as refundable amount and 1000 as registration fee. Candidates must pay the admission fee to confirm their seat at the institute. MIET Meerut fee structure might include components other than the tuition fees. The BSc fees are paid every year. There are eight semesters in the programme.
faqs.question: What is the fee for BSc Biotechnology at MIET?

faqs.answer: A:    The MIET Meerut BPharma fee is around INR 2.8 lakh. The fees is the total amount for eight semester. Candidates must pay the admission fee to confirm their seat at the institute. MIET Meerut fee structure might include components other than the tuition fees. The BPharma fees are paid every year.
faqs.question: What is the fee for MIET Meerut BPharma?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the admission guidelines of MIET Meerut, for admission to the BPharma course, CUET exam is must . Admission to the BPharma course entrance-based. Candidates must qualify for the CUET exam for admission. MIET Meerut BPharma admission is an online process conducted on the institute's official website. The applicants must meet the basic eligibility for the desired courses before applying for the course. Find below the BPharma eligibility criteria for admission in 2024:Eligibility Criteria: Class 12 with 50-55 % aggregate in the Science stream.
faqs.question: Can I get admission at MIET Meerut in a BPharma course without CUET?

faqs.answer: A:    MIET Meerut offers 60 seats for its BSc in Microbiology course. To secure the BSc seats, candidates must complete a step-wise admission procedure which mainly includes the application process, selection process, and counselling. After completing the admission procedure, candidates are shortlisted for final admission. Shortlisted candidates are allotted seats, which they must finalise by paying the MIET BSc tuition fees.

reviews_list.review_title: A student shares the true reality of colleges.

review_content.Placements: Placements at our college are not very good, they are below average. They try hard, but only one or two core companies come, and that too only sometimes. Other than this, only small companies come to pick students for work like data entry and other labor-intensive jobs. If you don't get a job, they give you a placement in the college itself.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really bad. Even the faculty don't have air conditioning in the summer, let alone the students. The mess is okay, but the classes and buildings are really old and need to be furnished. There are cracks, and there is no air conditioning in the labs. The places that are good are only there to show outsiders so that they can get admissions and fill their pockets.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good. I suggest students get admission here. It has highly supportive staff.

review_content.Placements: The overall percentage of students who get placed is 100%. It is an ideal number. The highest package is 26 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS and Deloitte hire students. More than 50% of students got internships from the B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering course. The top roles offered are quality engineer and quality assurance.
review_content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good. The courses provided are B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and B.Pharma. Classrooms are good and clean. Smart classrooms are also available with a projector. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel is good. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility is available here. 2 times food is available in the mess. Food is provided on time in the mess. Sports like volleyball, football, and basketball are played at the AKTU University.

faqs.answer: The total Course Fee of B.Tech at Meerut Institute of Technology is INR 4.08 Lakhs. B.Tech is a four-year programme in which fees are paid every year. Every year has two semesters. So, there are eight semesters in the programme and the fee of eight semesters is INR 4.08 LPA. The Fee is paid every year which means that the fee of one year for B.Tech is INR 1.2 Lakhs per annum. One year has two semesters. The hostel fee at Meerut Institute of Technology for one year is nearly 50,000 which includes the mess charge, electricity bill, Wi-fi charges, etc.
faqs.question: Q: What is the fees for Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology BTech course?

faqs.answer: Meerut Institute of Technology is a private Institute affiliated with AKTU University. Yes, one can pursue a B.Tech at Meerut Institute of Technology without taking the JEE exam as it is a private college and does not have any entrance exam. So, by applying at the official website of MIET you can get admission to the college. One can fill out the application form from the college and can go to college whenever required or students can simply go to the reception area of the college and get proper guidance and counseling from the team in the college itself after giving the fee for the programme one can easily secure their seat at Meerut Institute of Technology.

review_summary.college_name: MIET Meerut Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: MIET College is good for every student.

content.Placements: Almost 80 percent of the students got placed last semester in our CSE branch. The highest package is about 12 LPA, and the minimum package is about 3.3 LPA. Top recruitment companies are TCS, HCL, Deloitte, Samsung, Cognizant, and many other tech companies visit every semester. Almost 60 percent of the students got internships in different streams.
content.Infrastructure: The facility and infrastructure that our college management is providing are good for every student. Facilities such as free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are all very well maintained. The hostel management also provides all necessary facilities to every student. The mess and canteen food are good for everyone to eat. Medical and health facilities are also very well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College life with memories.

content.Placements: Not all the students were placed, even people who were placed got fired after 1 month. The highest package was of 14 LPA, and the average packages were of 3.7 LPA. The top recruiting companies were TCS, Deloitte, HCL, Accenture, Capgemini, and Cognizant, and some small start-ups.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, but not maintained, they paint the wall, nothing more they do. The classrooms were big and had all the facilities. The quality of food was average, and the hostel was also not that good-looking. The college provides bus services as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: A student shares the true reality of colleges.

content.Placements: Placements at our college are not very good, they are below average. They try hard, but only one or two core companies come, and that too only sometimes. Other than this, only small companies come to pick students for work like data entry and other labor-intensive jobs. If you don't get a job, they give you a placement in the college itself.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is really bad. Even the faculty don't have air conditioning in the summer, let alone the students. The mess is okay, but the classes and buildings are really old and need to be furnished. There are cracks, and there is no air conditioning in the labs. The places that are good are only there to show outsiders so that they can get admissions and fill their pockets.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is good. I suggest students get admission here. It has highly supportive staff.

content.Placements: The overall percentage of students who get placed is 100%. It is an ideal number. The highest package is 26 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. Companies like TCS and Deloitte hire students. More than 50% of students got internships from the B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering course. The top roles offered are quality engineer and quality assurance.
content.Infrastructure: The overall infrastructure is good. The courses provided are B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and B.Pharma. Classrooms are good and clean. Smart classrooms are also available with a projector. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel is good. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility is available here. 2 times food is available in the mess. Food is provided on time in the mess. Sports like volleyball, football, and basketball are played at the AKTU University.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology review.

content.Placements: College has a good placement track record, and some of the best companies like TCS, Bosch, Wipro, Accenture, Deloitte, and AWS recruit during placements. The average package is 3.5 LPA, and the highest package is 28 LPA. So, overall, it's a nice placement experience. I would advise my juniors to go for this college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities available in our hostel include Wi-Fi, drinking water, lights, fans, and beds. Fully air-conditioned classrooms are available in our college. There is a central library on campus where students can issue books. The quality of the food in the mess is average. We have three canteens on campus, and the fast food is good. We also have a small ground to play different sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.

admission_process.title: MIET Meerut Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology admission 2025is merit and entrance-based. The admissionprocedure comprises merit in the qualifying examination or entrance exam scores. Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology (MIET) offers 28 undergraduate and postgraduate programmes in Engineering & Technology, Applied Science, Pharmacy, Education, Computer Applications, and Management. The institute also offers vocational courses in Engineering and Management. Besides this, it offers additional training to add value to the courses.Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technologyprovides numerous placement opportunities to students in top recruiting companies like Accenture, Genpact, Axis Bank, TCS, Tech Mahindra, and Cognizant Technologies.

Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology offers several UG and PG courses, admission to which is granted based the merit in the qualifying examination and scores in the entrance exam. It accepts the scores of various state and national-level entrance exams like UPSEE, JEE Main, CAT, MAT, and others. The applicants must meet the basic eligibility for the desired courses before applying for the course. The table below lists presents the admission status of popular MIET Meerut courses along with their eligibility and selection details:
Class 12 with 50-55 % aggregate in Science stream
Bachelor's degree with 50% aggregate in any discipline
BTech/ BE OR MSc in a relevant discipline
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology fees include multiple components such as registration fees, development fee, security fees, etc. Te security fee of INR 5,000 is refundable after the completion of the course. MIET Meerut seats are allotted once the candidate completes the admission process. Find below seats and fees for admission 2025:
*This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Candidates must complete the admission process of MIET Meerut for admission. The admission procedure includes the application process, selection process, and counselling. . Check below the MIET Meerut admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

For some of the courses, candidates need to register at the official websites of JEE Main,CUET UGand CUET PG. For all the other courses, aspirants either need to apply on the official website of MIET Meerut.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

Candidates either need to qualify specified entrance exam or fulfil the educational requirements. The university considers CUET,NATA, JEE Main, etc. for admission to specific courses. A merit list might be released by the university to announce the names of the shortlisted aspirants.
Step 3: Counselling

Selected candidates are either required to come for MIET Meerut Counselling or respective entrance exam counselling. For courses offered through CUET UG or CUET PG, candidates need to register for counselling on the CUET website of the university. Aspirants need to confirm their seats by paying the course fee.

placement_data.title: MIET Meerut Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: According to MIET Engineering and Management NIRF reports 2024, the median package offered during MIET BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 3 LPA , respectively. Further, as per the Pharmacy NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during MIET BPharm and MPharm placements 2023 stood at INR 3.22 LPA and INR 2.64 LPA , respectively. Earlier, according to the NIRF 2022 report, a total of 607 UG and 100 PG students were placed during MIET placements 2021. The median package offered to BTech students was INR 3.60 LPA . For MBA and MPharma courses, the median package stood at INR 3.75 LPA and INR 3.12 LPA, respectively .

faqs.answer: Nearly, every student who applied was accepted into the programme. The highest compensation package available was 10 LPA. The base compensation package was 2.4 LPA. The average compensation package was 6.5 LPA. However, according to the NIRF 2022 report, MIET placements in 2021 involved a total of 607 undergraduate and 100 graduate students. The typical salary for BTech students was INR 3.60 LPA. The median compensation for MBA and MPharma programs was INR 3.75 LPA and INR 3.12 LPA, respectively.

faqs.question: What is the fees for Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology BTech course?
faqs.answer: The total Course Fee of B.Tech at Meerut Institute of Technology is INR 4.08 Lakhs. B.Tech is a four-year programme in which fees are paid every year. Every year has two semesters. So, there are eight semesters in the programme and the fee of eight semesters is INR 4.08 LPA. The Fee is paid every year which means that the fee of one year for B.Tech is INR 1.2 Lakhs per annum. One year has two semesters. The hostel fee at Meerut Institute of Technology for one year is nearly 50,000 which includes the mess charge, electricity bill, Wi-fi charges, etc.
