reviews.review_heading: MIET College is good for every student.
reviews.review_text: The facility and infrastructure that our college management is providing are good for every student. Facilities such as free Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are all very well maintained. The hostel management also provides all necessary facilities to every student. The mess and canteen food are good for everyone to eat. Medical and health facilities are also very well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: College life with memories.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but not maintained, they paint the wall, nothing more they do. The classrooms were big and had all the facilities. The quality of food was average, and the hostel was also not that good-looking. The college provides bus services as well.

reviews.review_heading: A student shares the true reality of colleges.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is really bad. Even the faculty don't have air conditioning in the summer, let alone the students. The mess is okay, but the classes and buildings are really old and need to be furnished. There are cracks, and there is no air conditioning in the labs. The places that are good are only there to show outsiders so that they can get admissions and fill their pockets.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good. I suggest students get admission here. It has highly supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is good. The courses provided are B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, and B.Pharma. Classrooms are good and clean. Smart classrooms are also available with a projector. Wi-Fi facility is available. The hostel is good. A 24-hour Wi-Fi facility is available here. 2 times food is available in the mess. Food is provided on time in the mess. Sports like volleyball, football, and basketball are played at the AKTU University.

reviews.review_heading: Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology review.
reviews.review_text: Facilities available in our hostel include Wi-Fi, drinking water, lights, fans, and beds. Fully air-conditioned classrooms are available in our college. There is a central library on campus where students can issue books. The quality of the food in the mess is average. We have three canteens on campus, and the fast food is good. We also have a small ground to play different sports like volleyball, football, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is good but it could be better and the department infrastructure is also good. Labs, classrooms, and all are good. Sports and games are average but I can be better with good facilities. Labs can be better because of practical purposes. Teachers should be more considerate.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college in Meerut for B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is nice. Wi-Fi is also working properly. The lab chair is also comfortable. The library is nice, but classrooms are not perfect. In hostel, there are all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate on volleyball. Indoor games are available.

reviews.review_heading: This college is nice for engineering in Meerut.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is better than others. Wi-Fi is also available, and labs are working properly. Chair is comfortable. Library is nice, and classrooms are also perfect in the hostel. There are all facilities like AC and Wi-Fi. Medical facilities are also available. In sports, they concentrate in volleyball, indoor games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: College had a rich and modern infrastructure. The labs were well-equipped with modern types of equipment. At MEIT, there was a vibrant campus with lush green surroundings. All hostel rooms had first aid boxes, air-conditioned rooms, electric water heaters, etc.

reviews.review_heading: M.Tech ECE course admission in the year 2026 at Meerut Institute of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: This college's infrastructure quality is very good and uses high-quality facilities like fast Wi-Fi connection, neat and clean classrooms, bathrooms, many computers in labs, a library, etc. Facilities are available in this college. The college canteen food is not tasty because it uses low-quality materials, and hygienic food is not provided.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in terms of campus and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old but good. The CSE department has a very big building. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel. Lab facilities are good. Classrooms are not very good but average. Good library facilities are available. The canteen food is good, but the hostel mess food is of average quality. A sports ground is available. The civil engineering department also has good infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: Nice college for B.Tech and nice faculty.
reviews.review_text: Nice hostel, AC rooms, and washing machines are also available. An iron is available, nice food is given by them, and all things are done on time. Wi-Fi and internet connection are available throughout the whole college. Classrooms are neat and clean, and electricity is available 24/7.

reviews.review_heading: Lack of teachers, facility, and focus on assignments. Finally better than other colleges in city.
reviews.review_text: Our college has cheap food and we never go to hostels. Prefer paying guests, and no nutrition in food. The food tastes very bad. No proper things to do and have fun in hostel like other colleges. Nothing for sports so much restrictions and cleanliness is also an issue. There are no proper bathrooms.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good CSE (AIML) infrastructure, knowledgeable faculty, and provides good assistance.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old but good, especially in CSE with a very large building. Wi-Fi facilities are available in the hostel. The lab facilities and classrooms are average but good. The library facilities are available. The canteen food is good, but the hostel mess food is of average quality. A sports ground is available.

reviews.review_heading: "College has good CSE infrastructure, knowledgeable faculty, and industry-ready curriculum.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is old, but the CSE building is very large. Wi-Fi is available in hostels. Lab facilities are good, classrooms are average but decent, and library facilities are available. The canteen food is good, but hostel mess food is of average quality. Sports grounds are available.

overview_faqs.question: Is SJC Institute of Technology good?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, SJC Institute of Technology is quite good. SJC Institute of Technology is an autonomous college under VTU from 2024-25. The college is AICTE approved and accredited by NBA (CSE, ISE, ECE, ME, CV, AE) and NAAC with A+ Grade. The college offers UG and PG courses to students. The college is ranked 161 by Times 2024 for BTech, 49th in Dataquest Survey on All India Top Private T-Schools 2024, and 56th in Dataquest Survey on All India Top 100 T-Schools Employability Index 2024. The placements are also good.

individual_reviews.title: Positive AI&ML learning experience at SJCIT.

content.Placements: For the AI and ML Batch at SJC Institute of Technology, about 70 to 80% of students are placed. The highest package is 9 to 10 LPA, the average is 5 to 7 LPA, and the lowest is around 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture and Capgemini. Around 50 to 60% students got internships, mainly in AI&ML, data analytics, and software roles.
content.Infrastructure: The college has the necessary infrastructure for the AI & ML department. SJC Institute of Technology Provide well-equipped AI and M Laboratories with system support, Python, machine learning frameworks, and data analytics tools. Classrooms have projectors and smart teaching aids. The library offers technical books, journals, and digital resources relevant to AI and ML, and data science. Campus Wi-Fi supports academic work, and basic sports and hostel facilities are available and maintained.

admission_process.title: SJC Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SJC Institute of Technology admission process includes registration, selection and confirmation. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can begin by filling out the application form. Find below step-wise SJC Institute of Technology admission details:
STEP 1: SJC Institute of Technology Application Process 2025
Aspirants can also apply online for any of the SJC Institute of Technology programmes. Candidates can visit the official website to apply for the respective course.
STEP 2: Selection

The selection criteria for course admission are entrance-based. For B.E courses, candidates are selected based on COMEDK UGET/KCET, GATE for MTech courses, and KMAT/CMAT/PGCET Rank is compulsory for the MBA course.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

After selection, shortlisted candidates are required to pay the programme fee to confirm their seat in the institute. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSJC Institute of Technology feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

faqs.question: Is B.E available at SJC Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, the B.E. course is available at SJC Institute of Technology. The institute offers B.E. courses at the UG level. Candidate must meet the eligibility criteria to enrol for B.E. course admission set by the college. Aspirants must pass Class 12 with a 45% aggregate. SJCIT's admission process is entrance-based.

courses_data.description: SJC Institute of Technology offersMBAcourses at the PG level. The course is offered in five specialisations, namely, Finance, Marketing, HR, Business Analytics and Dual Specialisations. A total of 90 seats are available for this course. Candidates who are looking for MBA course admission must complete graduation with a 50% aggregate. Students can check below to know more MBA course details:

faqs.question: Is it easy to get admission to MBA at SJC Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: To enroll in an MBA course at SJC Institute of Technology, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. The institute offers full-time MBA courses lasting two years. Students are selected based on the entrance exam, i.e., KMAT/CMAT/PGCET. In addition to the selection criteria, students must pass the graduation (common eligibility).

faqs.question: Are admissions to MBA at SJC Institute of Technology entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA course is based on an entrance exam at SJC Institute of Technology. The MBA Program is a PG degree designed to equip students with advanced skills and knowledge in business management and leadership. MBA courses focus on practical applications and case studies, preparing graduates for leadership roles across industries.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA admission at SJC Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: For admission in a MBA programme at SJC Institute of Technology, the aspirant must fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria. Thus, only the aspirants who have passed graduation with a 50% aggregate (45% for SC / ST & Category-I only for Karnataka students) are eligible for admission. In addition, students should have passed the qualifying examination from a recognised board.

faqs.question: Can I join SJC Institute of Technology after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes, candidates can join SJC Institute of Technology after Class 12. The institute offers ten B.E. courses at the UG level. Candidates must pass Class 12 or equivalent with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects. Aspirants are selected based on COMEDK UGET/KCET.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for SJC Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: SJC Institute of Technology admissions are based on entrance exam scores. Candidates must complete Class 12/graduation as per the course requirement. Aspirants must apply online for admission. Candidates can visit the official website to apply for the respective course.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in SJC Institute of Technology without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, to secure admission to B.E., MTech and MBA courses at SJC Institute of Technology, candidates must meet the college's eligibility criteria. Candidates need to pass Class 12 for undergraduate courses and graduation for the PG course. The selection process is based on national-level entrance-exam scores such as GATE, CMAT, etc.

placement_data.title: SJC Institute of Technology Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placements are going on for the Class of 2025. As of now, 89% students have been placed in reputed companies. The highest and average package offered during SJC Institute of Technology placements 2025 stood at INR 12 LPA and INR 4.5 LPA, respectively. 87 recruiters visited the SJC Institute of Technology campus for 2025 placements and offered 684 job offers to the 2025 batch students. The total number of single job offers stands at 449 .

SJC Institute of Technology has a Career Development and Corporate Affairs Centre (CDCAC), which is responsible for all placement activities at SJC Institute of Technology. It trains the students in various areas like Personality Development, Quantitative Aptitude, Logical Reasoning, Verbal Reasoning, Group Discussion techniques, etc.

cut_off.college_name: SJC Institute of Technology Cutoff 2025: Check Karnataka PGCET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: SJCIT cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

SJCIT Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 30163 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 22639 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at SJCIT. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 30163 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2023, the cutoff rank for the same course was 22106.
For more categories, rounds, and quotas, candidates can use the provided filters to view the cutoffs.
Candidates preparing for 2026 admission can refer to the table below to view some of the important dates related to Karnataka PGCET 2026.
SJCIT accepts Karnataka PGCET entrance exam scores for admission to the MBA/PGDM courses. Candidates can refer to the table below to check out the consolidated year-wise Karnataka PGCET cutoff lists.

As per the KCET last-round cutoff 2025 for B.E. / B.Tech admission, B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning has the lowest cutoff rank of 46679 for the General AI quota. The lower cutoff rank indicates strong competition for admission.
In 2024, the last round cutoff for the same specialisation was 49615, in the General All India quota.
For other categories, rounds and quotas, use the filter options below:
According to the SJCIT B.E. / B.Tech Cutoff 2025, the closing rank for B.Tech in Computer Science and Design stood at 38511 among the students belonging to the General AI quota.
Students can use the filters provided below to view the cutoff for other categories and quotas for 2025, 2024 and 2023.

hostel_campus.college_name: SJC Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Positive AI&ML learning experience at SJCIT.
reviews.review_text: The college has the necessary infrastructure for the AI & ML department. SJC Institute of Technology Provide well-equipped AI and M Laboratories with system support, Python, machine learning frameworks, and data analytics tools. Classrooms have projectors and smart teaching aids. The library offers technical books, journals, and digital resources relevant to AI and ML, and data science. Campus Wi-Fi supports academic work, and basic sports and hostel facilities are available and maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and well-qualified teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available. Wi-Fi is super. The lab facilities are very good. There is a large space. Many systems are there so that everyone can use them in labs. There is a big and silent library with all books. The quality of the hostel is good. We have food and medical facilities. Sports and games are encouraged.

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing with good education.
reviews.review_text: First I would like to thank our HOD for providing all the facilities in our department. We have Wi-Fi, labs with good equipment, systems, and lab neatness. Library is so good and we get all books in the library. Whenever I have free time I go to the library.

reviews.review_heading: Best College with decent infrastructure and placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Wonderful infrastructure with spacious classrooms and labs. The hostels are also well-maintained, with decent food options. The hostel mess and canteens inside the hostel and college are also well maintained. Medical facilities include the visiting of doctors three times a week, both in college and the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of S J C Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The hostel facilities are good. Wi-Fi facility is available 24X7 in the hostel. The food served in the hostel is good. Washrooms are clean. It is easy to reach classrooms as the hostel is located near the college. They serve chapati with a decent curry. They serve a variety of food items.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Some places have to get developed. Wi-Fi is not good in our college. All labs are good. Classrooms are good. The library is good. The hostel is not good. Its fee is high, and its facilities are not good. The quality of the food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college regarding  the teachers.
reviews.review_text: Actually I am not an honest person. But yes they were good is what I felt. Hostel fee is like INR 70,000 per year with 3 or 4 Bed sharing in a room. For single occupancy fees is a little bit higher. College infrastructure is good located in a very peaceful place with no air pollution.

reviews.review_heading: Every thing is good in our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very beautiful. Our campus is big and has many buildings like the EC branch, mechanical branch, etc. Our campus is fully enabled with Wi-Fi. Labs are highly moderate with all the required equipment. The library of our college has all types of books, magazines, and notes. Our college students will participate in all the sports events organised by the government. Our college conducts inter-college competitions.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college. It has good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is extremely good. We have labs and good Wi-Fi on campus, and we have a library. We have a canteen on campus, and we do sports in our college. The food is good in our hostel. The hostel is very clean, and the rooms are very spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Good Placements in 2022.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college and hostel is very good. Classrooms are regularly cleaned and well sanitized. All the labs are connected with internet and even though, the systems are old models, they work perfectly. The college supports sports activities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and infrastructure good placement in my batch2020 .
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities and infrastructure, our department is very good does teachers are very co operative and helpful to gain knowledge, Wi-Fi also there, spacious classroom, both digital and classical library are there, hostel facility are also very good, mess have both north india and south indian food, good medical facilities and encourage in sports and games .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides a huge library, classrooms and monitor labs. Wi-Fi connection is provided for students. The quality of the food is delicious and hygienic. The canteen is clean. Our college has 2-3 canteens, and also other state students have menus. Equipment required for practical is very neat, and new equipment is provided. Lab facilities are very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and friendly faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The campus is lush green. Medical facilities are available for students 24x7.  Sports has been given more prominence.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is nice, and the teaching is good, but placements are not that good.
reviews.review_text: The department is very good except for some lectures. Wi-Fi facility is not available, but labs, classrooms and library are good. The quality of the hostel is not bad, but when in terms of food, it's the worst. Our college canteen is good now. Our college has a huge ground, along with an indoor stadium and gym.

reviews.review_heading: Its all good, Satisfied because we have good placement and faculty.
reviews.review_text:
1. In our IT block department, We have Wi-Fi Facility and have a separate department library for Study in free time with a high-speed LAN internet connection. 
2. In the hostel of SJC institute of technology, we have two mess one for NORTH and another for SOUTH and food is good at starting later its average taste after a few months. We get a different menu which follows weekly in mess and that prepared by final year student of that mess. NORTH mess and SOUTH mess fee difference is 5k. In the hos...

review_summary.college_name: Vivekananda Global University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It was a really good experience at VGU.

content.Placements: In my batch, there were almost 25 students in CSE. Out of them, maybe 12 students got placement. Other students themselves find jobs or internships through various job portals. The highest package was 30 LPA in my batch. Companies like TCS and medium-scale companies were hiring.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the course was good, and college life was better. In my opinion, I got an opportunity to get involved with various students from foreign countries. It was amazing sharing thoughts with them. There is good hostel life. According to the packages of the course, you can choose a hostel room according to the 1 seater, 2 seater, and so on.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: A wonderful college, Vivekanand Global University Jaipur, Rajasthan. Definitely check this out.

content.Placements: The number of students placed in my course is about 66 out of 110, and this is a good ratio, we can say. The highest package is 36 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average package is 10 LPA. The top recruiters are Amazon, Deloitte, TCS, Zomato, and many more. About 65 percent got internships from the 3rd year onwards, and to good companies as well. Top roles are as a junior software engineer and assistant professor.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is pretty cool, and it gives a proper environment to study, but the infrastructure of the hostel is not that good. The main problem is hostel food. You have to manage food there. Otherwise, everything is okay. The canteen is also there, and you can find almost everything of your choice, from food to fast food. Also, there is a wonderful gym where you can build yourself strong, and medical facilities are also available. Wi-Fi works amazingly in college.

individual_reviews.course: BCA in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: In my college, if I talk about my BCA branch, 50% of the students got placed in 2024 and 60% in 2025. The placement rate here is good overall. The highest package is 36 LPA. The lowest is 12 LPA. The average package is around 15 LPA. These are some of the top recruiting companies: Paytm, Wipro, Teach Mahindra, Accenture, and Capgemini. Around 70% students got internships from my course in these companies (Paytm, Wipro, Teach Mahindra, Accenture, Capgemini). Top roles offered are HR, software engineer, web developer, data analyst, and AI engineer.

individual_reviews.course: Ph.D in Forensic - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Shiksha College review – Student.

content.Placements: Our college provides placement to more than 80 percent of students in companies, with the highest package of 12 LPA CTC. Many top different companies visit my college. The percentage of students who got internships in this course is more than 60 percent in my college. Top roles are offered by Tata Company.
content.Infrastructure: All the facilities are available for my course. The infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available for students, and classrooms and the library are also very good. Canteen food is very good, medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also present for all the students in my college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Hotel Management and Catering Technology (BHMCT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college but can be improved in some places.

content.Placements: Almost everyone gets the opportunity to get placed, and the maximum package as well as minimum package is also good. The previous year's batch got so many good companies and even got the full support of the training and placement cell. Overall, everything is well balanced.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels are good with proper Wi-Fi facilities and good wardens. There are three types of rooms, solo rooms, two-seater, and three-seater rooms. It's a good thing because if someone wants to take solo room, they can take that easily. Children coming from the same family have 2 and 3 seater rooms.

admission_process.title: Vivekananda Global University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vivekananda Global University admission 2025is open. Admission to Vivekananda Global University is merit-based and depends on the entrance exam scores, and interview rounds. Vivekananda Global Universityoffers various UG, PG, and doctoral-level programmes in the field of Law, Management, Accounting & Commerce, Design, Computer Science & IT, Engineering, Hotel Management, and Science among many others. Some of the popular courses offered byVivekananda Global Universityinclude BTech, MTech, MBA, BBA, BCA, MCA, BSc in Forensic Science, BPT, and BDes. The mode ofVivekananda Global University course admissions 2025is online.

Vivekananda Global University (VGU) offers UG, PG, PhD, and Diploma level programs. Candidates seeking admission to VGU have to appear for CUET, and VGUCET tests for consideration for admission. Some of the major highlights are covered in the below-mentioned table:

VGU Jaipur course admissions 2025for all of its courses are done based on entrance exams. Check below the complete VGU Jaipur admission process:Application:The mode of application is online. Candidates must register online and then fill out the online application form.Selection rounds:Appear for the university-level entrance exam i.e., VGUCET followed by university-based selection rounds and then wait for the release of their resultsAdmission confirmation:Once the selection rounds are done, the shortlisted candidates are called for document verification. Aspirants need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: What are the steps to fill Vivekananda Global University application process?
faqs.answer: To fill Vivekananda Global University application go to website, register with your email/mobile, pay INR 1000 application fee, fill in personal/academic details, upload required documents & submit form. Admission is based on entrance exams like VGUCET, CUET or merit.

faqs.question: Who are eligible to fill the Vivekananda Global University application form?
faqs.answer: Prospective students who meet specific academic qualifications for undergraduate, postgraduate or doctoral programmes & can provide necessary educational documents are eligible to apply to Vivekananda Global University Jaipur. Students must register online pay non refundable registration fee & have their documents verified by the admission team.

placement_data.title: Vivekananda Global University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The Vivekananda Global University placement cell works dedicatedly to enhance the on campus placements for both the companies and students. VGU Jipur has released its official placement highlights for 2025. More than 1400 offers have been provided during the VGU Jaipur placements 2025. The highest package offered to the students during the placement sesaon was INR 46 LPA . Whereas, the highest stipened recorded during VGU Jaipur placements was 50,000. Over 240 companies participated during the recent placement drive at Vivekananda Global University, Jaipur.

faqs.answer: The Vivekananda University is private and new, so placement would be moderate. The university has made its placement stats public in its official website. faqs.question: What is the fees for B.Sc Forensic Science course at Vivekananda Global University
faqs.answer: The fees structure for B.Sc Forensic Science course at Vivekanda global university, the data says that the fees comes 1 Lacs to 1.5 Lacs per year for B.Sc course.they too have hostel that cost 100000 per year.the fees like book fees, exam fees, registration fees are should paid seperately. The fees structure vary from 75000 to 2 Lacs based on your scores in 10 +2 or your national exam scores.Vivekananda global university also provide scholarship based on your background and your scores.The fees vary on every year so, its safe to conduct the admission office and enquery about fees for your marks.

faqs.question: Does Vivekananda Global University refund fees?
faqs.answer: The registration form or application form will not be refunded in Vivekananda Global University. It common in all irrespective of college you are enrolled. But as per government norms will get refund for tution fee if you paid any. It is common for every college. To get refund from college you should confirm your admission cancelled based on your college rules and regulations. Then you will get refund for tution fee, hostel fee, bus fee this will be refunded.

highlights.description: One of India’s top institutes is VGU Jaipur. As per the India Today Ranking 2025, the rank of the institute is #218 under the category Engineering (Private), #135 under B.A., #190 under B.Com., #139 under B.Sc., and #165 under BCA. VGU Jaipur is top ranked by multiple national ranking bodies for its academic offerings and renowned faculty. Its faculty has a proven track record of doing great research. The article mentioned below covers all the necessary details you need if you're interested in the VGU Jaipur rankings.

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook, VGU Jaipur outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment.
In the 'State Private University' category, the rankings of the institute have demonstrated an increasing trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, VGU Jaipur climbed 3 ranks to #30 rank in the 'State Private University' category by the Outlook ranking.
Check out the updated rankings and category details from different ranking bodies below.
Read less

qs_world.description:
Based on the rankings from QS World University Rankings, VGU Jaipur outperformed numerous other institutes, securing a higher position, indicating that the institute is considered to be doing better in various factors evaluated by the QS World University Rankings system. In the 'Asia' category, the institute's ranks have ascended when compared with the previous year's ranking. hostel.description: VGU provides separate hostel facility for boys and girls with all facilities such as water purifying system, gymnasium, TV room and indoor games facility, magazine, newspaper reading,24 hrs wifi and Geysers. Mess facility with hygienic, nutritious meals and snacks are also provided.

library.description: VGU has a learning resource center which is of two floors and separately situated. It houses a rich collection of more than 4000+ books and 1500+ E-books. The library has given access to more than 2000+ e-journals and also to web based video courses, prepared by the professors of leading institutes of the country. Simultaneously gives access to 60 students to work on computers as well as to read the books.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Hockey Ground, Volleyball Court

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab, Physics Lab, Internet Technology Lab, Object Oriented Programming Lab (Java/C++), Database Management System (DBMS) Lab, Network programming Lab, Project Lab, Computer Graphics Lab, Unified Modeling Language (UML) Lab, Software Engineering Lab (CASE tools), MATLAB, Carpentry Lab, Fashion Lab, Robotics Lab

reviews.review_heading: It was a really good experience at VGU.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the course was good, and college life was better. In my opinion, I got an opportunity to get involved with various students from foreign countries. It was amazing sharing thoughts with them. There is good hostel life. According to the packages of the course, you can choose a hostel room according to the 1 seater, 2 seater, and so on.

reviews.review_heading: A wonderful college, Vivekanand Global University Jaipur, Rajasthan. Definitely check this out.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty cool, and it gives a proper environment to study, but the infrastructure of the hostel is not that good. The main problem is hostel food. You have to manage food there. Otherwise, everything is okay. The canteen is also there, and you can find almost everything of your choice, from food to fast food. Also, there is a wonderful gym where you can build yourself strong, and medical facilities are also available. Wi-Fi works amazingly in college.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities & infrastructure in my college are so good. The college has fully furnished classrooms, high-speed Wi-Fi, separate computer labs, and a library with a quiet environment and a lot of books. The hostel facilities and the quality of food are so good. The college has one-tier, two-tier & three-tier hostel rooms with fans, coolers & ACs with RO purified water. The medical, sports, and games facilities are the best.

reviews.review_heading: Shiksha College review – Student.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are available for my course. The infrastructure of the college is very good. Wi-Fi is available for students, and classrooms and the library are also very good. Canteen food is very good, medical facilities are available, and sports and games are also present for all the students in my college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college but can be improved in some places.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are good with proper Wi-Fi facilities and good wardens. There are three types of rooms, solo rooms, two-seater, and three-seater rooms. It's a good thing because if someone wants to take solo room, they can take that easily. Children coming from the same family have 2 and 3 seater rooms.

reviews.review_heading: I am Vanish, I am pursuing B.Tech.
reviews.review_text: There are no facilities. Wi-Fi is not working for labs. All professors are bad; it is a waste of college. Don't come to this college. Game support and mess are good, but all are bad. Don't come to this college; it feels like a fake university. Please, no support for this college feels high.

reviews.review_heading: It is good to take admission. Placements, facilities, teachers, and environment are all good.
reviews.review_text: Our course is no pen or paper. We use laptops in classes for study. It is totally digital. We have Wi-Fi, a library, and classrooms with AC and TV for studies. Facilities in the hostel are okay. Canteens are good. There are semester-wise sports tournaments, and it's good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college, but students should be active and intelligent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is well-developed. Wi-Fi is available across campus. Classrooms are spacious, and labs are well-equipped. The hostel facilities are very good, with clean rooms, hygienic food in the mess, medical support, sports grounds, and recreational areas.

reviews.review_heading: College review of Vivekananda Global University.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members support and assist students at every step. We have a proper lab and Wi-Fi access across the campus. Cleaners are available everywhere to maintain cleanliness. Food facilities are good, and they even give sweets after meals. The staff also shows gratitude for their service.

reviews.review_heading: It is not good to pursue an MBA from this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite impressive. There are well-maintained classrooms with proper facilities. Classrooms are neat and clean. Wi-Fi is present in the academic building only. The library is big and fully air-conditioned. The hostel is decent and some repair is required. Overall, I am satisfied with it. RO water is available in all hostels. Rooms are big enough and we get multiple playground courts for different games. Sports events happen from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: College is only for direct admission students.
reviews.review_text: I give a 5/5 rating for the college infrastructure because the classes are fully air-conditioned. There is a huge library for self-study. There are separate buildings for different departments. All labs are fully equipped. The quality of the hostels is decent, with all facilities like washing machines and water coolers provided. The hostel mess is quite impressive, offering good quality food of different kinds. All sports courts are present in the college. Sports events happen from time to time.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the faculty, placements are very good, and facilities are also nice.
reviews.review_text: The facilities of Wi-Fi are very good and labs, classrooms, and libraries are also very great. It have so many windows and fans and in some rooms there are also air-conditioners so that students can study comfortably and with a relaxed mind. Food quality is also good and there are very good facilities of sports and games like you can make your career in sports according to your interest in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Together we grow globally.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well-established with Wi-Fi across the campus. Particularly in our department, there is a psychology lab and a geography lab. Classrooms are equipped with projectors, whiteboards, and well-ventilated windows. The hostel is good. The food is also good. The mess and canteen are also there. There is a cricket ground, football ground American football ground, basketball court, volleyball court, boxing, indoor sports arena, etc.

reviews.review_heading: With experience and guidance, you will achieve your goals here.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Classrooms are clean and well-furnished with projectors and proper ventilation. You can find almost all the books of your course in the library with journals and articles in peaceful surroundings. I want to recommend that you please avoid the canteen and mess food.

reviews.review_heading: Review by Apoorva Singh of Vivekananda Global University.
reviews.review_text: In this course, all facilities are available. The infrastructure of the college is so superb. Wi-Fi, classroom, library, and all things are present. The medical facilities are available, and sports and games are so good and available in my college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college is good, and in the end, what really matters is students' hard work.

review_content.Placements: Toppers and students with skills get placed in reputed companies. Average students with good skills also get placed in good companies so what matters is students' ability. Overall, placements are good in numbers.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It has smart boards, which make it easy to understand the higher technical terms. Our labs are good and are being updated now with Windows 11 PCs. Our college has a library with so many books and PCs for use in college-related stuff.
review_content.Faculty: Exams here are conducted by VTU University Belgaum and are conducted very strictly. Results are provided within 10 days after exams. Our teachers are well-experienced and guide us to score well. Many students score well with hard work.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: GNDEC - Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are very poor. Due to the lack of top companies in our city, no companies visit our college because it is far away from Bangalore. In our college, what lectures teach is not enough to get placements. Around 50% of students got placed. Students should search for placements by themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It is the biggest college in our city. It contains many branches. All facilities are good. The lab is good. Our college has a ground, an auditorium, and a garden.
review_content.Faculty: Our college is under VTU, so exams are conducted according to its rules and dates. Faculty members are not good at teaching. Some of them are good but not all. There are many courses in our college like computer science and engineering, information science, and electrical and electronics engineering. Most of the lectures belong to the Singh caste.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College Bidar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It has a mesmerizing environment.

content.Placements: 20% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered in our college is 8 LPA. The average package is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are Infosys BPM, TVS, Titan, and Adenza. 10% of students got internships from our course in Chennai state companies. NCC and Navy guidance are offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, supportive mentors, and classrooms. The food quality in the canteen and mess is good and hygienic. It offers both veg and non-veg food. Coffee, tea, and all things are also available. Sitting arrangements for both girls and boys are separate. According to need, we can take food. It also provides games like cricket and football.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It's good for explanation on study-based, but not campus-based, and no one comes for placement.

content.Placements: No company comes for placement. The college is good for everything, but the important is placement. This is why I'm not recommending anyone based on placement. Based on my experience, it is not good for our batch, but we are serious about getting some students placed. No one comes here.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is also good, based on living conditions. All the facilities are in the hostel, like a hospital, ladies' attendants, security guards, and every facility is there in both the college and the hostel.
content.Faculty: The college is very good for completing the syllabus. The exams are conducted very strictly. In one hall, there are 2 teachers, and 2 times checking is compulsory. If anyone brings chits or anything, they will be debarred, and their paper will be marked as a fail. Some teachers do not debar students if the examiner observes that the student should be debarred compulsorily.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, and in the end, what really matters is students' hard work.

content.Placements: Toppers and students with skills get placed in reputed companies. Average students with good skills also get placed in good companies so what matters is students' ability. Overall, placements are good in numbers.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It has smart boards, which make it easy to understand the higher technical terms. Our labs are good and are being updated now with Windows 11 PCs. Our college has a library with so many books and PCs for use in college-related stuff.
content.Faculty: Exams here are conducted by VTU University Belgaum and are conducted very strictly. Results are provided within 10 days after exams. Our teachers are well-experienced and guide us to score well. Many students score well with hard work.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: GNDEC - Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are very poor. Due to the lack of top companies in our city, no companies visit our college because it is far away from Bangalore. In our college, what lectures teach is not enough to get placements. Around 50% of students got placed. Students should search for placements by themselves.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It is the biggest college in our city. It contains many branches. All facilities are good. The lab is good. Our college has a ground, an auditorium, and a garden.
content.Faculty: Our college is under VTU, so exams are conducted according to its rules and dates. Faculty members are not good at teaching. Some of them are good but not all. There are many courses in our college like computer science and engineering, information science, and electrical and electronics engineering. Most of the lectures belong to the Singh caste.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Good institute for pursuing your degree in BIDAR !

content.Placements: The placement percentage this year of my branch was approximately 85 to 90 percent. The highest package offered was 8lpa and the lowest was 3 LPA and average came out to be 4 to 4.5 LPA. The major companies include TCS, Wipro and Wie labs, etc. The major roles offered to students of my branch were software developer, designer, web developer, etc.
content.Infrastructure: We have good furniture in classrooms with 6 fans in each room and Air conditioning for labs which requires it. Also we have a department library which is separate from the main library. The hostel rooms also are in good condition and the food provided in hostel is of good quality. Our hostel has veg food. It serves breakfast, lunch, dinner and 2 times tea.

description: Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College Bidar cutoff 2025 is available on this page for admission to several UG & PG courses. Candidates can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the course, exam, round and category-wise cutoff details. Further exam-related updates are below:

Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College Bidar Karnataka PGCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. For admission to the MBA/PGDM course, the last round cutoff rank was 27118 in the General AI category. For the HS quota, the last round cutoff for the same course stood at 23420 in the General category. Comparing both the quotas, it is clear that the cutoff rank was less competitive for admission to the General AI category students as compared to the HS quota.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College Bidar. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 27118 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 35030, while in 2023, it was 30003.

hostel_campus.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College Bidar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It has a mesmerizing environment.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi, labs, libraries, supportive mentors, and classrooms. The food quality in the canteen and mess is good and hygienic. It offers both veg and non-veg food. Coffee, tea, and all things are also available. Sitting arrangements for both girls and boys are separate. According to need, we can take food. It also provides games like cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: It's good for explanation on study-based, but not campus-based, and no one comes for placement.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is also good, based on living conditions. All the facilities are in the hostel, like a hospital, ladies' attendants, security guards, and every facility is there in both the college and the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and in the end, what really matters is students' hard work.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. It has smart boards, which make it easy to understand the higher technical terms. Our labs are good and are being updated now with Windows 11 PCs. Our college has a library with so many books and PCs for use in college-related stuff.

reviews.review_heading: GNDEC - Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. It is the biggest college in our city. It contains many branches. All facilities are good. The lab is good. Our college has a ground, an auditorium, and a garden.

reviews.review_heading: Good institute for pursuing your degree in BIDAR !
reviews.review_text: We have good furniture in classrooms with 6 fans in each room and Air conditioning for labs which requires it. Also we have a department library which is separate from the main library. The hostel rooms also are in good condition and the food provided in hostel is of good quality. Our hostel has veg food. It serves breakfast, lunch, dinner and 2 times tea.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. Wi-Fi facility is not available in our college. They provide labs, classrooms, and a library. Our college provides us with sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with some amazing teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good compared to others in the city. It has Wi-Fi access and labs and digital library and classrooms equipped with projectors and. Canteen food is good and there is also hostel separate for boys and girls. Each department has its own facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is pretty good according to the place it is situated. Everything is provided according to the needs of the student. Every facility provided by the college is good. Still, development is needed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities in terms of quality education. Wi-Fi facility is available but restricted. Classrooms are well and neatly maintained. Library is easily accessible with a variety of books. Hostel facility was not available. The quality of food was average. Medical facilities are available. Sports are provided only for boys.

reviews.review_heading: I am moderately satisfied with everything, but they can improve teaching pattern.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus provides free Wi-Fi although it was very slow. The laboratories were old fashioned, and the classrooms were moderately new. There were two libraries i.e one was hard copy books library and another one was digital library.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for engineering and for those who want to learning.
reviews.review_text: Good classroom with good ventilation and in summers, we use fans. Wi-Fi facility was not available at that time. Quality of food was not that much good, needs to improve the food quality. The sport facility was only for cricket, foot ball and volleyball and some indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied because of its placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was beautiful. There was a separate floor or a separate building for every department. It has clean classrooms, laboratories with all equipment, and a good library. The college was serious about sports and games. Medical facilities were not good, and the mess was good. The canteen was also good.

reviews.review_heading: It not a good college for those who dream for good placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides Wi-Fi at 2G speed. I am a day scholar so I don't know about the hostel, but some of our friends are who stay there said that it is average. Very few people participate in sports but they conduct it. The food served is good for survival, and not much to expect there.

reviews.review_heading: You have many better options than this college. Placements are below average but has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: Overall the infrastructure of the college is good when compared to other local colleges. We have good lab facilities, and Wi-Fi is available everywhere, but I don't know why we cannot access it. We have good sports facilities. I am a day scholar so I don't know much about the hostel, but according to my friends who stay there, it is like any other hostel. The food quality is average, but you will get used to it. So overall, I would rate the campus with 3 stars out of 5.

reviews.review_heading: I am averagely dissatisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: The entire campus was Wi-Fi enabled, and the classroom was digitalised. Library provided E-magazine, journals, and different types of newspapers. Hostel facilities were good. Rooms were shared according to the number of students. Mess served north Indian food and it was tasty. College was having a general hospital near the Gurudwara area. We had badminton, volleyball, cricket stadium and also indoor games like carrom.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about GNDEC - Guru Nanak Dev Engineering College

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are good for our batch and our senior batch. Almost 60% of the students were hired by almost four or five companies. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.Some job profiles are listed here:Brand ManagerAccount ManagerInternational Business ManagerMarketing ExecutiveBusiness Technical ConsultantAll the best.

These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.question: How much salary does an Engineer get?
overview_faqs.answer: Many companies offer great salary packages in metro cities which are hub for IT companies as well as other reputed MNCs. The salary also differs as per the entry level. After gaining experience of 2-5 years, you can expect a salary of 8-12 LPA and then shift from technical to managerial roles.Know more about -Engineering Career

review_summary.college_name: B.B.S.College of Engginering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college but has a few inexperienced faculty members.

content.Placements: In our course of B.Tech civil engineering, there were a few placements in companies like JP cement and a few other companies but when it comes to computer science and EC branch the placements were good, and companies like Infosys and others visit to hire students.
content.Infrastructure: The college building and its library were beautiful as compared to other colleges. Library provides centralised air-conditioner and computer laboratories facility. The hostel building was average, as well as there was a Wi-Fi facility for every student. The quality of food in the hostel was average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The faculty members are very helpful and understanding.

content.Placements: We faced many problems to get placements. The placements are not provided. The placements during corona are very difficult, so many companies can't hire freshers. This is a problem.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has the best infrastructure. The facilities are good. The hostel quality is better. The ground is huge, and we play cricket.
content.Faculty: The teachers are very helpful and understanding. They explain the topics and help students to prepare for exams. The teachers are very humble and helpful. They explain the topics in a very understanding way. The teachers are the best.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Our campus has good faculty, placements, and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placements in our college are good for our batch and our senior batch. Almost 60% of the students were hired by almost four or five companies. The lowest salary package offered was 2.5-3 LPA. Companies like HCl, Ashoka Leyland and TCS, visited the campus for placements. Almost 60% of students got internships from college. There is a placement cell available here.
content.Infrastructure: The college library is very good as all types of books are available here. The library is fully digitalised. High-speed Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. Labs are very good. Medical facilities, sports and games are available here. The canteen and hostel rooms are very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of B.B.S.College of Engineering and Technology.

content.Placements: In B.Tech (Civil Engineering). Our college provides internships, the best learning programs, and 98% placement. B.S. Group of Institutes affiliated with AKTU and PRSU, approved by AICTE. The highest and lowest packages range from 3 to 15 LPA. Top recruiting companies include ICICI Bank, O Peto, HCL, Motherson, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is average. Good food is available in the mess and canteen. Medical and sports facilities are below average. The campus grounds and classrooms provide the best environment. Medical support is provided by D-Pharm and B-Pharm members.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: This college has a really good infrastructure.

content.Placements: 20 percent of the students were placed in various companies and got job in different salary package starting from 2 to 3 lakh per annum. TCS and Wipro are involved in the placement drives. IT and CS branch gets best placements but other branches get less placement.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Wi-Fi is available and classrooms are well ventilated. There is a good library and air conditioned classrooms. Medical facilities are not available but sports and canteen are good.

review_summary.college_name: JP College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Don't join JP College before reading this review!

content.Placements: Around only 50% of the students get placed in my course. The highest package is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 2 LPA. There are no MNCs hiring in my college. Students have to find their own internships. The roles offered are only trainee or intern.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel has no Wi-Fi facilities. The food quality is average in the hostel mess. The canteen facility is also average. There are no proper medical facilities in the hostel. The college has only a 400m athletic track, and other than that, there are no other sports facilities. The college has Wi-Fi facilities but no computer lab in the Computer Science department.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Get to know about JP College of Engineering.

content.Placements: I am an ECE student, and placements in our college are average for our department. Most of the students are trying to get into IT instead of their core companies. The companies coming for the placement drive are startup companies, with the highest salary package offered being 4 LPA and the lowest salary package offered being 1.5 LPA. There are no internship opportunities through the college; we have to find our own internships. The top recruiting companies are Accenture and Sisense.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is average. Minimal lab facilities are available in my department. There is no Wi-Fi facility available on the college campus. Classrooms are maintained neatly. The library has a decent number of books, but most of them are outdated editions. Hostel food is average, but the accommodation is good. The canteen is good, and no sports and other co-curricular facilities are supported by the college.

individual_reviews.title: Really good college, you can join. Cost worthy .

Several students work for the companies as testers, developers, data analysts, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides us with good infrastructure and facilities. The environment is very neat and peaceful. The laboratory is maintained properly and it facilitates AC and separate service. The hostel facility is very good. The food is very quality and nice to eat. The hostel was maintained and cleaned routinely .

individual_reviews.title: Teachers and other staff are not good as well.

description: JP College Engineering cutoff 2025 for admission to the BE/BTech program at the undergraduate level has been released. The cutoff list is out for the General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, and PWD categories. Candidates can check out the exam-wise section below to get an idea of the JP College Engineering cutoff 2025 across different exams, courses, rounds, and categories. Further updates are provided below:

JP College Engineering TNEA cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to the BTech course and its various branches. The cutoff was announced for the reserved and unreserved categories belonging to the All India quota.
For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 148421 to 224796. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

Students can view the JP College Engineering BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at JP College Engineering was B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 148421.

Getting an idea of previous years' cutoffs helps students better understand the cutoff trends and prepare for the upcoming exams accordingly. To assist in the same, below is a table provided where students can view or download the consolidated round and year-wise TNEA cutoff PDFs. In Tamil Nadu, admission to BE/BTech, BE (Sandwich) and MTech Computer Science and Engineering (Integrated) courses is based on class 12/JEE Main entrance exam scores. hostel_campus.college_name: JP College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description:

Fees per year : 40000/-

Separate hostel for boys and girls with basic needs
Fees per year : 40000/-

reviews.review_heading: Don't join JP College before reading this review!
reviews.review_text: The hostel has no Wi-Fi facilities. The food quality is average in the hostel mess. The canteen facility is also average. There are no proper medical facilities in the hostel. The college has only a 400m athletic track, and other than that, there are no other sports facilities. The college has Wi-Fi facilities but no computer lab in the Computer Science department.

reviews.review_heading: Get to know about JP College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is average. Minimal lab facilities are available in my department. There is no Wi-Fi facility available on the college campus. Classrooms are maintained neatly. The library has a decent number of books, but most of them are outdated editions. Hostel food is average, but the accommodation is good. The canteen is good, and no sports and other co-curricular facilities are supported by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good college, you can join. Cost worthy .
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with good infrastructure and facilities. The environment is very neat and peaceful. The laboratory is maintained properly and it facilitates AC and separate service. The hostel facility is very good. The food is very quality and nice to eat. The hostel was maintained and cleaned routinely .

reviews.review_heading: Good and honest review of JP College Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There are facilities that include Wi-Fi, which is 100mbps. Labs are well-equipped, and classrooms are well-maintained and ventilated. The library boasts full of newly stocked books. The quality of food available in the hostel is average and commendable. There is also medical facility available in the college, sports ground present in the college, and no time to play.

reviews.review_heading: Teachers and other staff are not good as well.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are sometimes sufficient for us, and sometimes they are not enough, so facilities must be improved for the students. The quality of hostel food and facilities is not as good as it should be, so it definitely must be improved, along with other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Average college and campus life.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is quite good. Lab facilities are at an average level. Hostel facility is average and the food is not bad. Hostel has no Wi-Fi facilities and there is restrictions to mobile in hostels in limited time. There is no medical facilities in the college as well as the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The most affordable college in Tenkasi district for engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is commendable. The campus is spread over a large area, providing ample space for various facilities. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with nice benches. The hostel is average and the canteen is also average. No Wi-Fi is given, and no mobile phones are allowed.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JP College Engineering.
reviews.review_text: All lab facilities are good and have smart computers. Classrooms are very spacious and well-maintained. Our college has a library with more than 25,000 books. The hostel facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Really inspired by teachers and principal.
reviews.review_text: Yes, jp college of engineering has good infrastructure. Quality of the hostel is well maintained food quality is low. But hostel fees is less compared to other colleges. No Wi-Fi provided in the lab and classrooms. Mobile phone not allowed in the classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: We have a playground and hostel facilities are also available. Boys and girls' hostels are good. It also provides a gym and medical services are also available. We also have a good library and several books are available. Our college also provides library cards to students.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of its good teaching.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility in our college. The library and classrooms are good. The hostel is separate for boys and girls. Food is of poor quality in the mess. But the canteen food is average. Sports and games are held monthly. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I can't recommend anyone to join this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome. The college campus is surrounded by gardens completely. There is no Wi-Fi available. Labs are good. The library contains so many subject and knowledge related books. The canteen food is good but the prices are high. Sports and events happen weekly once in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend this college to students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and hostel are good. Laboratories and classrooms are clean, and the computers are good. The laboratories equipment is also provided. Wi-Fi is available only for the staff and management computers. Sports and games are conducted monthly once. Some cultural events and symposium are held in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement, good infrastructure, good facilities, good teachers but the management is poor.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi facility, phones allowed but not used in the classroom. The labs are good. All the labs are in separate room, library is fair, sport's and games are bad. The classrooms are spacious and have separate benches. The canteen food is cheaper and not tasty, good hostel facilities, and improve parking place.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with the food quality, medical facilities, and the company placements.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are comfortable with nature. Lab rooms are connected with Wi-Fi and AC. The library is very neat. The quality of food is good. The quality of medical facilities is available at any time. Our college conducts many sports and activities for our students.
